subject: It's Official!

body:
Big announcement to share | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/6bf0ebddaaf7/its-official?e=01c99b7fbd)
---
| |
---
|
# It's official: I'M IN THE FIGHT
---
|
---
| | **It's official! Yesterday I filed paperwork to become the next congresswoman in District 22.**

I intend to focus on what matters to you—enforcing our border, defending life, and supporting our President. It will be my greatest honor to represent our shared values on the campaign and, God willing, in the US House of Representatives.

As the socialist Democrats continue their efforts to overturn an election and steal the presidency that they couldn’t win at the ballot box, it's essential that we send the strongest and best equipped reinforcements to Washington.

I've got President Trump's back! That’s what this campaign is all about.

**Please visit[kathaleenwall.com](https://KathaleenWall.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=6732b2a961d1a34b05e3194bb&id=558a1a9458&e=01c99b7fbd) to donate and get involved today.**

I’m running to support President Trump’s agenda, fight to stop illegal immigration, and put Americans first. If you also support the America First Agenda, then I need your help.

**[Please consider volunteering](https://KathaleenWall.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=6732b2a961d1a34b05e3194bb&id=e0e45fa81c&e=01c99b7fbd), [endorsing my campaign](https://KathaleenWall.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=6732b2a961d1a34b05e3194bb&id=4c73dfddad&e=01c99b7fbd), and sharing this message with your friends!**

– Kathaleen Wall
---

But with a lower average gift, that means we need more supporters like you chipping in to reach our fundraising goals this month and this quarter -- and if we don't pick up the pace, it's going to... | | | [](https://my.elizabethwarren.com/page/m/285289a6/45c30650/105335920/66f435c1/3415386294/VEsH/p/eyJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVm1hWEp6ZEc1aGJXVWxKUT09IjoiIiwiSlNWc1lYTjBibUZ0WlNVbCI6IiIsIkpTVjZhWEFsSlE9PSI6IjE4MzI2In0%3D/?g=4qwscq_HJ6FcsC0VbCsFfMA "https://elizabethwarren.com?source=em-header&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&zip=18326")

Every day, our grassroots movement is getting stronger -- with more people joining the fight alongside Elizabeth -- and we're trying to make sure we have the resources to match it.

But here's the thing: One of the most critical numbers we watch -- our average donation -- has gone down at a time when we need to be ramping up our investments.

We're so proud that this campaign is powered by grassroots donors chipping in what they can, when they can. But with a lower average gift, that means we need more supporters like you chipping in to reach our fundraising goals this month and this quarter -- and if we don't pick up the pace, it's going to have real consequences on our budget.

[**We can make up the difference if more people make a donation today for the first time. So can you chip in right now to help strengthen the movement for big, structural change?**](https://my.elizabethwarren.com/page/m/285289a6/45c30650/105335920/66f435c0/3415386294/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsImUzc2dkWEpzSUgxOSI6ImV3LW5vdjE5ZnIiLCJlM3NnY21WbVkyOWtaU0I5ZlE9PSI6IkVNTDU3Rl9FR1JfQVZHX1RfMjAxOTExMTRfVjFTMl9QX1QxIn0%3D/?g=4qwscq_HJ6FcsC0VbCsFfMA "https://secure.elizabethwarren.com/donate/ew-nov19fr?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&refcode=EML57F_EGR_AVG_T_20191114_V1S2_P_T1") | _If you've saved payment info with ActBlue Express, your donation will process automatically:_

---
>
Usually, a presidential campaign wouldn't pay much attention to $28. They'd care more about a different number: $2,800. That's what they can raise if _one_ rich person donates the legal maximum.

A lot of times, that's in exchange for meeting the candidate. You know who can afford to pay $2,800 to share their policy ideas with someone running for president? Wall Street bankers. Health insurance executives. Drug company CEOs.

But Elizabeth's time is not for sale -- and our movement is 100 times stronger for the long haul when 100 people chip in $28 to raise $2,800.

That's 100 people who own an equal piece of our campaign -- who bring their friends, family, and neighbors into this movement -- and fight from the heart.

Because Elizabeth doesn't cozy up to wealthy donors, she has more time to meet with people in their communities, host town halls where anyone can ask a question or share an idea, take tens of thousands of selfies, have tens of thousands of one-on-one conversations, and listen to what's on the minds of working people across the country.

That's the right way to campaign, and the only way to build a movement strong enough to win in 2020 -- to end Washington corruption, rebuild the middle class, and strengthen our democracy in 2021 and beyond.

**But it's only possible if grassroots donors keep pitching in to make it happen.** Supporters like you are the only people who own this campaign -- with no fancy fundraisers, no Super PACs, and no money from PACs or Washington lobbyists

[**If you can, please chip in anything you can for the first time to help close the gap.**](https://my.elizabethwarren.com/page/m/285289a6/45c30650/105335920/66f435c0/3415386294/VEsEBg/p/eyJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsImUzc2dkWEpzSUgxOSI6ImV3LW5vdjE5ZnIiLCJlM3NnY21WbVkyOWtaU0I5ZlE9PSI6IkVNTDU3Rl9FR1JfQVZHX1RfMjAxOTExMTRfVjFTMl9QX1QxIn0%3D/?g=4qwscq_HJ6FcsC0VbCsFfMA "https://secure.elizabethwarren.com/donate/ew-nov19fr?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&refcode=EML57F_EGR_AVG_T_20191114_V1S2_P_T1")

Thanks for everything,

Team Warren

[**DONATE NOW**](https://my.elizabethwarren.com/page/m/285289a6/45c30650/105335920/66f435c0/3415386294/VEsEAQ/p/eyJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsImUzc2dkWEpzSUgxOSI6ImV3LW5vdjE5ZnIiLCJlM3NnY21WbVkyOWtaU0I5ZlE9PSI6IkVNTDU3Rl9FR1JfQVZHX1RfMjAxOTExMTRfVjFTMl9QX1QxIn0%3D/?g=4qwscq_HJ6FcsC0VbCsFfMA "https://secure.elizabethwarren.com/donate/ew-nov19fr?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&refcode=EML57F_EGR_AVG_T_20191114_V1S2_P_T1")

name: Cornyn Alert
subject: lockstep
disclaimer_text: Paid for by MJ for Texas
body:
Texans deserve a senator who will serve them, not his bosses in D.C.

|
---
[](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/64890813/7f51f7bc/4bd3abdf/4ef0a19a/826390415/VEsH/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/logo?refcode=emaillogo&amount=5")

| | | [](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/64890813/7f51f7bc/4bd3abdf/4ef0a199/826390415/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjUwNSJ9/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-lessthan1yr?refcode=email_20191114.2nd__505__&amount=10&recurring=true")
---

**Sen. Cornyn marches in lockstep with Mitch McConnell.[Help us elect a leader who will fight for _us_ >>](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/64890813/7f51f7bc/4bd3abdf/4ef0a199/826390415/VEsF/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjUwNSJ9/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-lessthan1yr?refcode=email_20191114.2nd__505__&amount=10&recurring=true")**
* **First** , Sen. Cornyn voted to repeal the Affordable Care Act **eighteen times**. _Politico_ even dubbed him health care "repeal's top salesman."
* **Then** , Sen. Cornyn helped push hyper-partisan judges like Brett Kavanaugh to lifetime appointments on the Supreme Court.
* **Now** , he's standing by his D.C. bosses and violating his constitutional duty by **" vow[ing] not to pay attention to impeachment."**

**[Texans deserve a senator who will serve _them_ , not his bosses in D.C.
Pitch in now to help elect MJ Hegar and defeat Senator Cornyn >>](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/64890813/7f51f7bc/4bd3abdf/4ef0a199/826390415/VEsC/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjUwNSJ9/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-lessthan1yr?refcode=email_20191114.2nd__505__&amount=10&recurring=true")**
[**DONATE**](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/64890813/7f51f7bc/4bd3abdf/4ef0a199/826390415/VEsD/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjUwNSJ9/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-lessthan1yr?refcode=email_20191114.2nd__505__&amount=10&recurring=true")

\-- Team MJ

[**DONATE**](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/64890813/7f51f7bc/4bd3abdf/4ef0a199/826390415/VEsA/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjUwNSJ9/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-lessthan1yr?refcode=email_20191114.2nd__505__&amount=10&recurring=true")

body:
A monthly, recurring contribution is an investment in kicking Chris Smith out of Congress in 2020.
|
---

| | Friends, I have dedicated my entire career to protecting human rights at home and abroad. But my work is not finished, and I cannot do this alone. For 39 years, Chris Smith has voted over and over for the global gag rule, to restrict a woman's right to choose, and to limit the rights of the LGBTQ+ community. If it were up to him, he would ban abortion outright. **It is time for someone else to stand up and fight for our community in Washington.** **That is why we need your help right now:[Can you commit to making a monthly donation to our campaign today? A monthly, sustained donation is a direct investment in unseating Chris Smith next year.](https://stephanie.bsd.net/page/m/5eff08d/522d4087/7afd3a8a/4f341d67/2080587334/VEsH/?g=a8xLfFNw52hdjvzlCIGBu2A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/stephanienj-november?refcode=20191115_em&recurring=true&utm_medium=email&utm_source=stephanie&utm_content=1+-+Can+you+commit+to+making+a+monthly+donat&utm_campaign=20191114_em&source=20191114_em")** _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | **[Chip in $10 now](https://stephanie.bsd.net/page/m/5eff08d/522d4087/7afd3a8a/4f341d66/2080587334/VEsE/?g=a8xLfFNw52hdjvzlCIGBu2A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/stephanienj-november?express_lane=true&amount=10&refcode=20191115_em&recurring=true_abx_10&utm_medium=email&utm_source=stephanie&utm_content=2+-+Chip+in+10+now&utm_campaign=20191114_em&source=20191114_em")**

---
**[Chip in $30 now](https://stephanie.bsd.net/page/m/5eff08d/522d4087/7afd3a8a/4f341d64/2080587334/VEsC/?g=a8xLfFNw52hdjvzlCIGBu2A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/stephanienj-november?express_lane=true&amount=30&20191115_em&recurring=true_abx_30&utm_medium=email&utm_source=stephanie&utm_content=4+-+Chip+in+30+now&utm_campaign=20191114_em&source=20191114_em")**
---
**[Donate another amount now](https://stephanie.bsd.net/page/m/5eff08d/522d4087/7afd3a8a/4f341d63/2080587334/VEsD/?g=a8xLfFNw52hdjvzlCIGBu2A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/stephanienj-november?express_lane=true&20191115_em&recurring=true_abx_other&utm_medium=email&utm_source=stephanie&utm_content=5+-+Donate+another+amount+now&utm_campaign=20191114_em&source=20191114_em")**

Smith's dangerous agenda does not have to continue. We can put a stop to it--together.
Our monthly contributions let us know how our campaign can grow--how many staff we can hire, how many ads we can run to spread our message, and how many voters we can reach.
**We need strength in numbers. The more supporters that commit to building this campaign, the better chance we have of bringing our shared vision to Washington.**
[**Can you sign up for a $20.20 recurring monthly contribution? Every pledged recurring contribution helps us get one step closer to victory.**](https://stephanie.bsd.net/page/m/5eff08d/522d4087/7afd3a8a/4f341d62/2080587334/VEsA/?g=a8xLfFNw52hdjvzlCIGBu2A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/stephanienj-november?refcode=20191115_em&recurring=true&utm_medium=email&utm_source=stephanie&utm_content=6+-+Can+you+sign+up+for+a+2020+recurring+mon&utm_campaign=20191114_em&source=20191114_em")
Thank you for your support,
Stephanie

Stephanie has a strong record of serving her community, protecting those most vulnerable, and solving difficult public policy problems. She's running to bring new leadership to Congress at a time when we need our leaders to solve pressing challenges and create opportunities for the people of New Jersey._ _Stephanie is running a grassroots campaign rooted in New Jersey values. She's not accepting any corporate PAC donations or money from special interests.[**Can you chip in $5 now to Stephanie's campaign?**](secure.actblue.com/donate/stephanienj-november?refcode=em_footer&amounts=5,10,15,20,25,30,35&amount=5)_

name: =?utf-8?Q?The=20White=20House?=
subject: NEW TODAY: Huge drop in border apprehensions
body:
While Congress did nothing, President Trump took action. | | | | [ ](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=77eee201d8&e=3ee4985eea)
---
| The White House • November 14, 2019
---
| | |
# **NEW TODAY: Huge drop in border apprehensions**
---
| **Earlier this year,** the Trump Administration sounded the alarm to Congress about an emerging security and humanitarian crisis on our southern border.

**The President repeatedly asked** Congress "to act to fix the loopholes in our broken immigration system, and close the gaps driving this crisis,” Acting Commissioner of U.S. Customs and Border Protection Mark Morgan said in a briefing at the White House today.

**“Unfortunately, not a single piece** of meaningful legislation has been brought forward,” he continued. “And as a result, this country stood by and watched as the crisis worsened, as we reached our peak in May of over 140,000 apprehensions in a single month.”

**Fortunately** , while Congress did nothing, President Trump took action.

**It paid off:** Acting Commissioner Morgan announced today a 14 percent reduction in border apprehensions in October—making for 5 consecutive months of decline. With just over 42,000 apprehensions in total last month, America has seen a 70 percent decline since May, when the crisis reached its worst point.

**“Through continued engagement** with the government of Mexico and the Northern Triangle countries, we have initiated a network of initiatives, policies, and of regulations to stem the flow of the migration,” Morgan said. “Together, we are approaching this as the regional crisis that it is, and we have seen incredible success.”

**But that doesn’t mean** the crisis is solved, Morgan warned. “While we made great progress, I want to remind the American people that there still remains a humanitarian crisis at our southern border, and, importantly, a national security crisis along our southwest border as well.”

**Daily border apprehensions** continue at an unsustainable rate. At its peak in May, they numbered more than 5,000 a day. But even now, American border officials are seeing rates of more than 1,000 per day, stretching the resources of our agents too thin.

**For context,** as former Obama Homeland Security Secretary Jeh Johnson said earlier this year, “a thousand apprehensions a day is a bad day.”

**America couldn’t afford** to wait for Washington’s career politicians to respond to the crisis earlier this year. Fortunately, this President believes in action, not empty promises. If and when necessary, he will continue to find real solutions to our nation’s toughest problems, including illegal immigration.

**Still, our country** will never find a long-term fix through the actions of the Executive Branch alone. Congress needs to step up and do its job—sooner rather than later.

[Read today’s full briefing by Acting CBP Commissioner Mark Morgan.](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=bda17c3542&e=3ee4985eea)

The President repeatedly asked Congress "to act to fix the loopholes in our broken immigration system, and close the gaps driving this crisis,” Acting Commissioner of U.S. Customs and Border Protection Mark Morgan said in a briefing at the White House today. “Unfortunately, not a single piece of meaningful legislation has been brought forward,” he continued. “And as a result, this country stood by and watched as the crisis worsened, as we reached our peak in May of over 140,000 apprehensions in a single month.” Fortunately , while Congress did nothing, President Trump took action. It paid off: Acting Commissioner Morgan announced today a 14 percent reduction in border apprehensions in October—making for 5 consecutive months of decline. With just over 42,000 apprehensions in total last month, America has seen a 70 percent decline since May, when the crisis reached its worst point. “Through continued engagement with the government of Mexico and the Northern Triangle countries, we have initiated a network of initiatives, policies, and of regulations to stem the flow of the migration,” Morgan said. “Together, we are approaching this as the regional crisis that it is, and we have seen incredible success.” But that doesn’t mean the crisis is solved, Morgan warned. “While we made great progress, I want to remind the American people that there still remains a humanitarian crisis at our southern border, and, importantly, a national security crisis along our southwest border as well.” Daily border apprehensions continue at an unsustainable rate. name: Tina Smith
subject: I have a feeling...
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Tina Smith for Minnesota
body:
I'm the only Senate Democrat who has to run back-to-back, and this is a must-win race to flip the Senate. Can I count on you to help?

| [](https://action.tinaforminnesota.%3D/?g=YCjTcDpTVzRarKyUt8_RZpA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tsm-em191114-then?refcode=em191114-then&recurring=yes&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=PA&phone=&employer=&occupation=") Team --

Last year, special interests flooded money into Minnesota to defeat me -- but I still won because I had supporters like you standing with me every step of the way.

Together, we built an incredible grassroots team, won our special election for Senate, and showed right-wing outside groups that nothing compares to people-powered campaigns. I have a feeling we have what it takes to do all that again next year.

As you know, I'm running for re-election in 2020. I'm the only Senate Democrat who has to run back-to-back, and this is a must-win race if we want any shot at taking back the Senate majority.

The thing is, we have a lot of ground to cover in the coming weeks and months. Tomorrow's mid-quarter fundraising deadline is our chance to prove we can muster the significant resources we'll need to protect this seat and keep Minnesota blue.

So, I'm turning to you for help:

**It's more important than ever that our network stays strong, focused, and on the offense. That's why I am relying on you to donate $10 (or more!) toward our mid-quarter goal. body:

| Hey team, Thousands of people have really stepped up this week to help us hit our $550,000 goal, and we're all so, so grateful for you. But the truth is we're still a little short -- and we need to hit this goal by tomorrow night.**Our team calculated the numbers, and we need just 134 donors from Pennsylvania to reach that target.** [**Can we count on you to be one of the donors we need from Pennsylvania?**](https://act.corybooker.%3D/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cory2020-em-decdebate?refcode=em_fr_20191114_AD_20191114-fr-AD-MG3-actives_actives_l1&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Cresco&state=PA&zip=18326&phone=&occupation=&employer=") I'm going to level with you for a second. Hi Team,

We're bumping John's announcement from this morning to the top of your inbox, because what he talks about below is so important.

We've always expected a deluge of outside fundraising in this race--and over the past week, we've gotten a real taste of how far Trump and McConnell will go to hold on to their Senate majority.

Take a moment and read John's message, and **chip in whatever you can towards our 48-hour goal:**
[](https://secure.hickenlooper.?g=Wvb-QcQot1BcsCb456pUfvA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hickenlooperforco-em-nov?refcode=em_fr_20191114_TH_20191114-fr-TH-moneymachinekick-2mo_2mo_contribbutton&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Cresco&state=&occupation=&employer=")
Thanks,
Team Hick

\---------FORWARDED MESSAGE----------

**From:** John Hickenlooper
**Date:** November 14, 2019
**Subject:** Mitch McConnell's money machine

Team,

From day one of this race, I've been honest about what we're up against: Donald Trump and Mitch McConnell are mobilizing every resource at their disposal to hang on to this Senate seat.

They're scared, and it's because we came out swinging. In just two months, we've built a grassroots operation that has proven to be highly competitive with the fundraising machine Mitch McConnell's been building for _decades_.

**Our campaign represents a major threat to McConnell 's grip on power, and he isn't going to let go without a fight.**

But here's the honest truth: Cory Gardner has had a big month.

Trump headlined high-dollar fundraisers for Gardner, and he mobilized the Trump campaign's online base to chip in $100,000 to Gardner's campaign.

We've been here before, and we've proven that we can close the fundraising gap fast. But with McConnell and Trump taking an increased interest in this race, we can't afford to fall farther behind.

**We 're setting a goal to raise $100,000 by Saturday night to help counter Trump's fundraising assist. Can you make a donation right now?**
_If you've saved your information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through right away._
[**_DONATE $5 NOW_**](https://secure.hickenlooper.?g=Wvb-QcQot1BcsCb456pUfvA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hickenlooperforco-em-nov?express_lane=true&amount=5&refcode=em_fr_20191114_TH_20191114-fr-TH-moneymachinekick-2mo_2mo__expresslane5&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Cresco&state=&occupation=&employer=")

John

name: Matt Innis
subject: Campaign Updates!
body:
With your help, we can send a REAL Nebraska Republican to the U.S. Senate! No Images? [Click here](https://email.transformationmarketing.com/t/r-e-jdhttruk-uktunkib-u/) [](https://email.transformationmarketing.com/t/r-l-jdhttruk-uktunkib-r/) We've had an exciting few weeks as we continue going all around the state and meeting more and more Nebraskans who tell me they are unhappy with my opponent. The people we meet are enthusiastic opinion leaders who are putting up signs and telling their friends and family members about our campaign. The people we meet are the best ambassadors our campaign has! We were in Wayne, Nebraska, on Sunday, to dedicate a flagpole with their American Legion on the 244th anniversary of the Marine Corps, in which I served proudly for eight years. After that we headed west for a nice event in Scottsbluff Sunday evening with supporters where we handed out signs and received donations. [Help Support The Campaign - Donate Today!](https://email.transformationmarketing.com/t/r-l-jdhttruk-uktunkib-y/) On Monday morning we did media interviews in North Platte before heading to Ogallala for a morning coffee meet-and-greet. A huge thank you to Christine Vail in Ogallala for putting this event together. We passed out more signs to this group and did an interview with the Keith County News and radio station KOGA.After Ogallala we headed to Sidney where we met with supporters and did an interview with the Sidney Sun-Telegraph. We then headed to Bridgeport where we met with members of the Morrill County Farm Bureau to discuss agriculture and other issues. Thank you to State Sen. Steve Erdman who helped put this event together! We headed north to Alliance where we ended our day with a meeting with supporters.On Tuesday we did several media interviews in Scottsbluff in the morning, then headed to Kimball to meet with new supporters. We headed back to Scottsbluff for an evening meeting with the Scottsbluff County GOP group and had a fantastic response. Thank you so much to GOP County Chair Kolene Woodward for the invitation to speak to the group. We handed out several yard signs and had requests for many more. [Yard Signs Available - Request One Now!](https://email.transformationmarketing.com/t/r-l-jdhttruk-uktunkib-j/) On the drive back east from Sidney, I listened to the "hearings" being staged by House Democrats on Impeaching President Trump. These hearings are an abomination and the Democrats should be embarrassed for wasting valuable time on this dog-and-pony show instead of passing a new trade agreement for our farmers and ranchers, working on an infrastructure plan, or doing countless of other things more productive than this impeachment joke. I support our President Trump until someone can come up with any evidence whatsoever that he has done something impeachable - which he has not. It is clear this is only political gamesmanship by the House Democrats and its shameful behavior by them.As you can see, we are putting in the hours and the miles to win this campaign at the grassroots level. We have trips planned along the southern tier counties in Nebraska, to the northwest, northeast and southeast parts of the state in November and December. Everywhere we go we are met with enthusiasm in support of our campaign and we keep hearing the frustration and disappointment from Nebraskans in my opponent. It's clear Nebraskans are looking for a new person to represent them in the U.S. Senate! [Volunteer to Help the Campaign](https://email.transformationmarketing.com/t/r-l-jdhttruk-uktunkib-t/) Keep telling your friends, family and co-workers about our campaign and ask them to contribute what they can to help us buy more signs and keep us on the road meeting Nebraskans. I'm willing to put in the long hours and the miles on the road to cover our entire state listening to Nebraskans and their concerns. Your support means so much!Keep talking us up and I look forward to meeting you on the campaign trail! Matt Innis, Republican Candidate for U.S. Senate **_Main Office_** Matt Innis for U.S. Senate
3434 O St
Lincoln, NE 68510 [](https://email.transformationmarketing.com/t/r-l-jdhttruk-uktunkib-i/) | [](https://email.transformationmarketing.com/t/r-l-jdhttruk-uktunkib-d/)| [](https://email.transformationmarketing.com/t/r-l-jdhttruk-uktunkib-h/)| [](https://email.transformationmarketing.com/t/r-l-jdhttruk-uktunkib-k/)
---|---|---
3434 O St.
Lincoln, NE 68510
You are receiving this email because you have expressed interest in receiving information from the campaign.

[ Tweet ](https://email.transformationmarketing.com/t/r-tw-jdhttruk-uktunkib-b/)
[ Forward ](https://mattinnisforsenate.forwardtomyfriend.com/r-uktunkib-0F20B823-jdhttruk-l-n)
[Preferences](https://mattinnisforsenate.updatemyprofile.com/r-jdhttruk-0F20B823-uktunkib-p) | [Unsubscribe](https://email.transformationmarketing.com/t/r-u-jdhttruk-uktunkib-z/)

name: Brandon Beach
subject: An Important Message For My Supporters
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Beach for Congress |
body:
---
| |
---|---|---
| Friend, Today, I am ending my campaign for Congress. During this campaign, I have come to realize that a calling to public service does not always mean running for higher office. After speaking with Governor Kemp this weekend, I believe that, at this time, I can help more Georgians in the positions I currently hold and be more effective in the State Senate than in Congress. Elected office was not my life’s desire, but a calling. I first entered the public service arena as President of the Greater North Fulton Chamber of Commerce, where I reversed years of mismanagement and debt to create one of Georgia’s most preeminent and well-run business organizations. That experience fueled my desire to serve in the State Senate, where I demonstrated a commitment to conservative principles by cutting taxes, reducing regulations, investing in education and infrastructure. We put politics aside and were able to accomplish great things for Georgia. I still feel strongly that we must elect bold candidates to federal office who can go beyond the rhetoric and advance common-sense conservative policies and practical solutions to the many challenges facing people across the 6th district and our State. **With that in mind, I will qualify to run for re-election for Senate District 21 next year. If I have the honor to be re-elected, I will continue to work tirelessly for the citizens of North Fulton and Cherokee County to ensure a better quality of life and ensure Georgia continues to be the #1 state to do business in.** I want to thank everyone that has supported my campaign with their time, financial contributions, words of encouragement and support. I am honored to have the continued support of leaders like Governor Brian Kemp, Lt. Governor Geoff Duncan, Cherokee County Chairman Harry Johnston, Cherokee County Commissioner Steve West, Fulton County Commissioners Liz Hausmann and Bob Ellis, and Milton Mayor Joe Lockwood. Governor Brian Kemp supports my decision and shared these words today: _“I applaud Senator Beach for his willingness to serve in Congress but respect his decision to remain in the State Senate. Quite honestly, we need bold leadership under the Gold Dome to continue our success and keep Georgia the best place to live, work, and raise a family. At the State Capitol, Senator Beach has led efforts to cut red tape and eliminate burdensome regulations on job creators. He has championed crucial infrastructure projects and reforms and worked to protect our conservative Georgia values. I look forward to partnering with Senator Beach in the years to come to lower healthcare costs, protect our families from gangs, enhance our educational outcomes and put hardworking Georgians first.”_ Thank you again for all of your support. I appreciate the trust you put in me and look forward to continuing to work for our families in Senate District 21. Sincerely, Brandon Beach |
| |
| |
---|---|---
| | [](https://brandonbeach.cmail19.com/t/r-l-jdhijiyk-udyuidthb-y/) [](https://brandonbeach.cmail19.com/t/r-l-jdhijiyk-udyuidthb-j/) [](https://brandonbeach.cmail19.com/t/r-l-jdhijiyk-udyuidthb-t/)

If I have the honor to be re-elected, I will continue to work tirelessly for the citizens of North Fulton and Cherokee County to ensure a better quality of life and ensure Georgia continues to be the #1 state to do business in. I want to thank everyone that has supported my campaign with their time, financial contributions, words of encouragement and support. I am honored to have the continued support of leaders like Governor Brian Kemp, Lt. Governor Geoff Duncan, Cherokee County Chairman Harry Johnston, Cherokee County Commissioner Steve West, Fulton County Commissioners Liz Hausmann and Bob Ellis, and Milton Mayor Joe Lockwood. Governor Brian Kemp supports my decision and shared these words today: “I applaud Senator Beach for his willingness to serve in Congress but respect his decision to remain in the State Senate. Quite honestly, we need bold leadership under the Gold Dome to continue our success and keep Georgia the best place to live, work, and raise a family. At the State Capitol, Senator Beach has led efforts to cut red tape and eliminate burdensome regulations on job creators. He has championed crucial infrastructure projects and reforms and worked to protect our conservative Georgia values. I look forward to partnering with Senator Beach in the years to come to lower healthcare costs, protect our families from gangs, enhance our educational outcomes and put hardworking Georgians first.” Thank you again for all of your support. I appreciate the trust you put in me and look forward to continuing to work for our families in Senate District 21. Sincerely, Brandon Beach | | | | | ---|---|--- | | | | | Paid for by Beach for Congress | | | | | ---|---|--- | | | |

Dear Friend, I'm excited to let you know that today I endorsed Tom Tiffany for Congress. Will you join me in supporting Tom? [SUPPORT TOM TIFFANY](http://email.sermodigital.com/ct/53483431:so30isvNY:m:1:2203588023:7DBADE4C4CA52AF5399F492BCDE5E1CB:r) **Tom is a true, tested conservative who will fight for Wisconsin families, small businesses and taxpayers.** Radical liberals used recalls, overtaking the Capitol and military-style John Doe raids to try and intimidate Wisconsin conservatives into abandoning our duty. **But Tom and I worked together to support billions in tax cuts, ban late-term abortions and enact concealed carry. ** [STOP RADICALS, JOIN TOM](http://email.sermodigital.com/ct/53483432:so30isvNY:m:1:2203588023:7DBADE4C4CA52AF5399F492BCDE5E1CB:r) Right now, Nancy Pelosi, Adam Schiff and the extreme left are trying to use impeachment to undo our votes for President Trump. Wisconsinites are sadly all too familiar with the unhinged attitude of Democrats who don't get their way, which is why we need effective leaders like Tom who have proven they will get things done.

**I am proud to endorse Tom Tiffany for Congress because he has proven he will fight for us, no matter what extremists throw at him.** Records matter, and Tom has demonstrated time and time again he's on our side. He's the ally President Trump needs to help defend the unborn, secure the border, and protect our Constitution. Can I count on you to help elect Tom Tiffany and send President Trump another ally in Congress who won't back down to pressure from the left? [STAND WITH TOM TIFFANY!](http://email.sermodigital.com/ct/53483433:so30isvNY:m:1:2203588023:7DBADE4C4CA52AF5399F492BCDE5E1CB:r) Keep the faith!

Leah Vukmir P.S. To learn more about Tom, please visit his website [here](http://email.sermodigital.com/ct/53483434:so30isvNY:m:1:2203588023:7DBADE4C4CA52AF5399F492BCDE5E1CB:r). body:
Our representative in Congress should put the people’s interests first, and that’s exactly what I intend to do as your congressman.
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/11888864/121607755/480453248?refcode=em_fr_2019.11.15_b1_ed_all&recurring=auto&amount=25&amounts=5,25,50,100,500,1000,2800&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83NTE3NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiZmZjYzUwMi1jNzA3LWVhMTEtODI4Yi0yODE4Nzg0ZDZkNjgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=KzXbfF0XPMy2MdIFlMjqzKZEPCZCVNcNy8QxOuTLiUg=) Team,

**This week, my team reached out to you about how we needed to raise $4,000 by week’s end to keep pace with our November grassroots fundraising goal.** Well, we’ve had an overwhelming response so far, and I have been so humbled by your continued support over the course of this campaign. I wanted to take a moment to thank a few folks who chipped in:
* * *
**David from Harrisburg chipped in $5.** _Thank you so much, David!_
**Jane in York donated $15.** _We couldn’t do this without you, Jane._
**Keith from Mechanicsburg gave $100.** _Keith, I greatly appreciate your support!_
* * *
**People like David, Jane, and Keith are powering our campaign to new heights.** Unlike my opponent, we don’t have -- and we don’t want -- the deep pockets of special interest groups on our side. Our representative in Congress should put the people’s interests first, and that’s exactly what I intend to do as your congressman.

name: Nikki Haley
subject: My time in the Trump administration
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the NRSC
body:
In my new book, I share insights into my time serving our nation as the U.S. Ambassador to the United Nations. You can order your copy today.

Peter,

I have very exciting news! My new book, _With All Due Respect: Defending America with Grit and Grace_ , is out. As a dedicated conservative I wanted to let you know about the opportunity to order a copy. [**Donate $40 or more to reserve your signed copy today!**](http://email.granitelists.com/ct/53486070:W_mifsvNG:m:1:1155937413:C843CD8C016EF3B63A62F862D2E8E53C:r)

[](http://email.granitelists.com/ct/53486071:W_mifsvNG:m:1:1155937413:C843CD8C016EF3B63A62F862D2E8E53C:r)

In the book, I share insights into my time serving our nation on the world stage as the U.S. Ambassador to the United Nations during the Trump administration. You don't want to miss my first-hand accounts! [**Reserve your signed copy today!**](http://email.granitelists.com/ct/53486072:W_mifsvNG:m:1:1155937413:C843CD8C016EF3B63A62F862D2E8E53C:r)

My very best,

Nikki Haley

**[**CLAIM YOURS NOW**](http://email.granitelists.com/ct/53486073:W_mifsvNG:m:1:1155937413:C843CD8C016EF3B63A62F862D2E8E53C:r)**

name: Senator Erica Smith
subject: A Front-Runner Earning Support the Right Way
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Erica for US
body:
[](https://act.myngp.com/el/S22uDRvhHkEMJ8PxfP9xgiqfpyGrvCeAwkCStkTN-Fc=/74Ia1wPdU-S1UkqNwRmqq0TmRYpGI5SO40odUMp0nlg=)

Dear Supporter,
In June, an Emerson Poll showed us up 7 points on Thom Tillis. Two subsequent polls in July and August maintained our lead.
In October, a Meredith College Poll showed us winning in a head to head against Tillis, while our primary opponent trailed Tillis in the polls.
Just yesterday, a Fox News Poll shows us up 5 points on our primary opponent who has spent at least $50,000 on digital ad campaigns with money raised from out of state billionaires trying to buy a US Senate seat!.
## [CONTRIBUTE TO OUR CAMPAIGN TO GET ALL OF OUR VOICES BACK TO THE SENATE!](https://act.myngp.com/el/S22uDRvhHkEMJ8PxfP9xgiqfpyGrvCeAwkCStkTN-Fc=/74Ia1wPdU-S1UkqNwRmqq0TmRYpGI5SO40odUMp0nlg=)
Our campaign to restore the voices of North Carolinians to the US Senate has earned US front-runner status. We have maintained because of your support and our goal to have "One of Us for All of US!"
Our needs inspire me to fight for all of US and WIN this seat so WE the People will have a champion when you send me to represent US in the US Senate!
Thank you for keeping the faith and for believing in this grass roots campaign! The land of the Long Leaf Pine will shine in the halls of the Senate again.

name: Lerah Lee for Congress
subject: Shady Shiff is going on ...
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Lerah Lee for Congress
body:
the do-nothing Democrat-controlled House of Representatives has NO TIME for you _Click here to[unsubscribe.](../July)****_ | **IMPEACHMENT SURVEY SUMMARY:**
_
**SUMMARY:** As a conservative Trump Republican running for Congress, I've had to answer my fair share of tough questions on impeachment.

I'm running for Congress to be a representative of the people. Please take my short survey to let me know your thoughts on the Trump Impeachment Hearings. **Knowing your thoughts will make me a stronger candidate

** [RESPOND ->](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/53486928:szR8ZsvNY:m:1:2184552809:77ACB68068A3BDC17F663E8E5A7B7BE4:r)
---
[](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/53486928:szR8ZsvNY:m:1:2184552809:77ACB68068A3BDC17F663E8E5A7B7BE4:r)
Friend,

**I have a message for you** : whether you're a working mother/father of five, or you're a millionaire with five houses, **the do-nothing Democrat-controlled House of Representatives has NO TIME for you**. Their only focus is impeaching the President of the United States to appease their increasingly radical base.

Nancy Pelosi has lost control of her members. By allowing these ridiculous impeachment proceedings to move forward, she is sending an incredible message to the American people: **_She doesn't run the House of Representatives - AOC and the "Sqaud" are the ones running the show_**.

To every freedom loving American I say this: **It's time to send a new, CONSERVATIVE Squad to Washington, D.C**. Can you imagine how much it would irritate AOC and Ilhan Omar to have to debate a black conservative on the merits of the radical ideas, rather than calling everyone who opposes them a racist?

While I know the singular reason for these impeachment hearings is to damage the credibility of the President, harming his chances at re-election, **I want to know what you think**. The more in-tune I am to the opinions of the voting public, the better candidate I'll be.

[Would you spare less than one minute to answer a few questions for me today? Click this unique link to begin your impeachment survey](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/53486928:szR8ZsvNY:m:1:2184552809:77ACB68068A3BDC17F663E8E5A7B7BE4:r) 🔗

| [ **Activate Impeachment Survey »**](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/53486928:szR8ZsvNY:m:1:2184552809:77ACB68068A3BDC17F663E8E5A7B7BE4:r)
---

The problem with Washington is that the folks charged with representing WE THE PEOPLE quickly forget they are accountable to anyone.

Abraham Lincoln once said, "_**Nearly all men can stand adversity, but if you want to test a man's character, give him power**_." We gave President Trump considerable power in 2016 and he has:
1. Fought to rebuild our moribund manufacturing industry
2. Fought to correct the lop-sided trade deficit with China
3. Battled with Congress to build a wall on our southern border
4. Guided our nation into the healthiest economy in more than half a century
5. Brought minority unemployment levels to their lowest-ever levels

**President Trump has stood beside us, lifted us up, and he's been a good custodian of our government**.

If I'm able to gather enough survey responses my goal is to hand-deliver them to the White House next time I'm in Washington, D.C. Please take 1 minute to quickly fill your survey out today.

[ **Activate Impeachment Survey »**](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/53486928:szR8ZsvNY:m:1:2184552809:77ACB68068A3BDC17F663E8E5A7B7BE4:r)
---

I'm so grateful to you, Friend

Blessings always,
[](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/53486928:szR8ZsvNY:m:1:2184552809:77ACB68068A3BDC17F663E8E5A7B7BE4:r)
Dr. Lerah Lee

| Paid for by Lerah Lee for Congress
---

This message was intended for: [dpwillis67@gmail.com](mailto:dpwillis67@gmail.com)
You were added to the system September 5, 2019.
For more information [click here](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/p/iszR8ZsvNY). [Update your preferences](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/p/oszR8ZsvNY)

Abraham Lincoln once said, "Nearly all men can stand adversity, but if you want to test a man's character, give him power_." We gave President Trump considerable power in 2016 and he has: 1. Fought to rebuild our moribund manufacturing industry 2. Fought to correct the lop-sided trade deficit with China 3. Battled with Congress to build a wall on our southern border 4. Guided our nation into the healthiest economy in more than half a century 5. Brought minority unemployment levels to their lowest-ever levels President Trump has stood beside us, lifted us up, and he's been a good custodian of our government**. If I'm able to gather enough survey responses my goal is to hand-deliver them to the White House next time I'm in Washington, D.C. Please take 1 minute to quickly fill your survey out today. I'm so grateful to you, Friend Blessings always, Dr. Lerah Lee | Paid for by Lerah Lee for Congress This message was intended for: mailto:dpwillis67@gmail.com You were added to the system September 5, 2019. For more information . | mailto:unsub-58107412312-echo3-629B8F90270836A159B94BB1E703DD0E@emailsendr.net?Subject=Unsubscribe&body=Please%20remove%20me%20from%20further%20mailings

name: Nina Ahmad
subject: You are invited!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Nina for PA |
body:
Dear Friend,

As many of you are aware, I am running for PA Auditor General. My main goal is to bring accountability and transparency to Pennsylvania. I would like to invite you to our first fundraiser located at the residence of Lee Nelson in Wyndmoor, PA. Please join me along with our hosts for an evening to meet me and learn more about the office that I am running for. For more information on this event please purchase a ticket here. For additional questions contact either Bilal Rice at bilal@ninaforpa.com or by cell (908) 294-1632. Again, I thank you for all your previous support and look forward to seeing you on the 22nd. Let's get to work!

Nina Ahmad, Ph.D., is a first-generation Bangladeshi-American, scientist, former Deputy Mayor for Public Engagement for the City of Philadelphia. She was recently elected to the National Board of NOW. She is one of the few women of color who serves on the board of the Philadelphia Foundation.

Please join

Lee Nelson Molly Sheehan

Sen. Katie Muth Sen. Art Haywood

Carrie DeHaven Elizabeth Jamison Lee

Beth Finn Catherine Coll

Ali Glickman Adrian Rivera-Reyes

Heather Isbell Schumacher

With Special Guests

State Senator Art Haywood
State Senator Katie Muth
State Representative Movita Johnson-Harrell

For an evening with

Nina Ahmad

Candidate for Auditor General

Friday, November 22, 2019

1207 Claridge Rd, Wyndmoor, PA 19038

6:00 – 8:00 p.m.

Suggested Contribution:

Co- Host: $500 Supporter: $100

Sponsor: $250

Friend: $50 Young Friend: $25

---------------------------------
| Paid for by Nina for PA |
---------------------------------

Nina for PA
PO Box 40681
Philadelphia PA 19107 United States

If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please https://act.myngp.com/el/66b42N61OHbRQnX5iE09ASvdvA2u2ynp5NQieKCbEy8=/yMCT0xBozAhHcNvtiiY3ORKp1LwfbS9E6kld48tXV10=.

We're still $3,076 short of our mid-quarter goal -- and we only have until midnight to hit it. Nikki has been on the phone non-stop trying to make sure we don't fall short, but she needs a little help from her grassroots base.
**Nikki is running for a reason.** She has a vision for the future -- for her children and ours.
A vision where her children aren't stuck with rapidly deteriorating environmental conditions, where her children don't have to practice active shooter drills at school, where her children make a living wage for their hard work, where her son Henry, born with a pre-existing condition, can easily obtain health insurance.
Nikki's opponent Steve Chabot doesn't believe in this vision, **but so many Americans do.**
**And that 's why I'm reaching out** \-- because I believe in Nikki's vision. And this deadline is crucial for Nikki's viability in the race.

A vision where her children aren't stuck with rapidly deteriorating environmental conditions, where her children don't have to practice active shooter drills at school, where her children make a living wage for their hard work, where her son Henry, born with a pre-existing condition, can easily obtain health insurance. Nikki's opponent Steve Chabot doesn't believe in this vision, but so many Americans do. And that 's why I'm reaching out \-- because I believe in Nikki's vision. name: Tim Walz
subject: re: Tonight
disclaimer_text: paid for by Tim Walz for Governor
body:
| My friend, President Trump is going to do everything he can to flip Minnesota red next year. The Minnesota Senate Republicans are lining up to defend him at all costs because they want to benefit from the tens of millions of dollars his campaign plans to pour into our state. [](https://act.myngp.com/el/NrSND9ISiDdPHzRXWPhgYrjGV-y-B66rkFli0i4tl2E=/8lkP_TCP5xO7FB7b6K0DyXEkNf5wGEPxQ-bqF57uxxY=?refcode=header&amount=25)
---
My friend,
President Trump is going to do everything he can to flip Minnesota red next year. The Minnesota Senate Republicans are lining up to defend him at all costs because they want to benefit from the tens of millions of dollars his campaign plans to pour into our state.
They defend him as his failed trade war continues to devastate Minnesota farmers. They defend him as his absurd $1.5 trillion tax giveaway to billionaires and ultra-wealthy corporations explodes the national deficit. They defend him as his administration tries to gut coverage for preexisting conditions 2.3 million Minnesotans rely on.
**They even defended him when he was in town last month spreading his divisive message across our state and unleashing attacks directly on our fellow Minnesotans.**
We deserve a Minnesota Senate majority that will put Minnesotans first, not one that tries to pit us against each other for their own political gain. That's why we're doing everything we can to take it back by electing allies who will help us rise above fear and division, and fight for a brighter future for our state.
**Our Q4 mid-quarter deadline is at midnight and we still need to raise just over $3,200 to hit our budget target so we can get the job done.[Can I count on you to make a contribution of $5, $10, $25 or more to help us finish strong before we run out of time?](https://act.myngp.com/el/NrSND9ISiDdPHzRXWPhgYrjGV-y-B66rkFli0i4tl2E=/8lkP_TCP5xO7FB7b6K0DyXEkNf5wGEPxQ-bqF57uxxY=?refcode=body&amount=25)**
Our 2019 fundraising totals will be made public for the first time shortly after the New Year.
**This is one of the biggest opportunities we 'll have to prove that our campaign for One Minnesota is stronger than ever. Let's make the most of it.**
[**Please, help us make up the difference and hit our goal by midnight. Make a contribution that works for you today.**](https://act.myngp.com/el/NrSND9ISiDdPHzRXWPhgYrjGV-y-B66rkFli0i4tl2E=/8lkP_TCP5xO7FB7b6K0DyXEkNf5wGEPxQ-bqF57uxxY=?refcode=body&amount=25)
_If you 've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_

******[Express Donate: $100](https://act.myngp.com/el/NrSND9ISiDdPHzRXWPhgYrjGV-y-B66rkFli0i4tl2E=/8lkP_TCP5xO7FB7b6K0DyXEkNf5wGEPxQ-bqF57uxxY=?express_lane=true&amount=100&refcode=_100-p)******
******[Express Donate: $250](https://act.myngp.com/el/NrSND9ISiDdPHzRXWPhgYrjGV-y-B66rkFli0i4tl2E=/8lkP_TCP5xO7FB7b6K0DyXEkNf5wGEPxQ-bqF57uxxY=?express_lane=true&amount=250&refcode=_250-p)******
******[Or, donate another amount](https://act.myngp.com/el/NrSND9ISiDdPHzRXWPhgYrjGV-y-B66rkFli0i4tl2E=/8lkP_TCP5xO7FB7b6K0DyXEkNf5wGEPxQ-bqF57uxxY=?refcode=_other-p)******
Thank you for everything you do for this campaign and the State of Minnesota.
I'm grateful,
Tim Walz

body:
Peter -

It's hard to believe, but we're just under a year out from Election Day 2020.

That means we must start organizing NOW to ensure we can protect and expand the historic gains we made last year.

We need 300 people to pitch in to our One Year Out Fund in the next 36 hours to ensure our Democratic grassroots movement has the resources to go the distance. ******[Other amount](https://act.myngp.com/el/ExoetHs8mYqWB16sVTTc3R6eudXF9T7P4W0LbMOfSw4=/fN5OFrB-Gk4rDQbzj2ClFwiJr8O6tgjOGij1lAyLtjM=?refcode=MT_EM_FR_WL_191114_1_1&amount=10.00&recurring=true&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&addr1=&addr2=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=50023&city=Ankeny&state=IA&phone=&occupation=&employer=)****** Since day one of this Congress, my colleagues and I have been hard at work delivering results for our communities -- whether it's getting dark money out of politics, protecting affordable health care, or passing gun violence prevention legislation, we're just getting started.

We need 300 people to pitch in to our One Year Out Fund in the next 36 hours to ensure our Democratic grassroots movement has the resources to go the distance. ****=** **=** **=** **=** **=** Since day one of this Congress, my colleagues and I have been hard at work delivering results for our communities -- whether it's getting dark money out of politics, protecting affordable health care, or passing gun violence prevention legislation, we're just getting started. Thanks for being on our team. Mike = Mike Thompson is a veteran and a longtime public servant. He represents California 's 5th district in Congress, where he fights for our healthcare and a clean environment every day. He cannot continue to do his crucial work without the support of people like you. We believe that communicating with our supporters is a vital part of our campaign. However, if you want to keep supporting Mike while receiving fewer emails,= Authorized & Paid For By Mike Thompson For Congress Mike Thompson for Congress PO Box 10541 Napa CA 94581 United States If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please =.

name: Team Hunt
subject: FreedomWorks Endorses Wesley Hunt!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Hunt for Congress
body:
Cites shared conservative principles

Friend,

Just yesterday, FreedomWorks for America, a national conservative organization of 6 million Americans focused on promoting free markets and individual liberty, [endorsed Wesley Hunt](http://links.wesleyfortexas.com/u/click?_t=fd5d6e7aa0334e7ebb096a39dc496016&_m=148b6c93f4a74efd8f4d0a5172368771&_e=a67QT58cV22WbuPzhaI8eYZr_pDwv4zApbogPQJP0vATEKJrz0bnOnAvUS4Tf4oS6dfaVwh6jkGK7M7bI8JSuvNcddOv1mXGAeZ6LGNhdGd9q8M9eoApSz9sLBJGL7FbNs82rigyC-SqtweMAyiUhmwz9FuY-ty-PqF7lFtmvFg0hmcKydTjvWeJLp_eA9a9FxgVTFHUVGudjQHO8sWPyxc95bG-Qdr34Ma2XRT8sTFjPF7p5BmCUsWiv-e9gVuCnaCP_Lcv1wT8OMcj3gLYbXIoSBtC7Fe2BIa0ZJlouVNPge4Q-4lSDdUvU19utzMtx_cO7WKAiJOmimhqFRrzEvw3D7XGiknthvC96Vig-KjFZPkVCrDxrN3oKmNX-UN-fbTEwlPwLMSu8gjWq0Q_HA%3D%3D), Houston native, combat veteran and Republican in Texas' 7th Congressional District.

“FreedomWorks for America is proud to endorse a true conservative, Wesley Hunt,” said Executive Director Noah Wall. “Hunt believes in free market solutions and will work towards balancing the out-of-control federal budget by putting an end to reckless spending in Washington. Hunt’s Democratic opponent boasts a hard earned 3% on the FreedomWorks Congressional Scorecard. **FreedomWorks for America looks forward to supporting Wesley Hunt, a candidate who will put the taxpayers of the seventh district first.** ”

[Click here to join FreedomWorks and endorse Wesley today!](http://links.wesleyfortexas.com/u/click?_t=fd5d6e7aa0334e7ebb096a39dc496016&_m=148b6c93f4a74efd8f4d0a5172368771&_e=a67QT58cV22WbuPzhaI8eQETX4mLEM7QAyrN9PzKScbAWa_d0PED89t2YHnNJb6_WzhQ-9KM4gdYf3Klkenf2otL2rRwzJPxbSV-gPeXcnVLxPXYJSl3eCByyYslPlhGEZ4Mg-QjvuBJyCVRWCyi9KuBR6VuEa6lXqZqDQzrYAK90ZYIoEfYMilVZyUgJlQ732hN_yFzGpD_vQHEQ0KolnqXToUORmsnwzdI6R7hPpetk0vGqQR_BlTqLPyYIdOn_hK0M5e1Y0892WqE8_rc4tCdGTq3hnJJXQm5ON4aTtQ%3D)

Our team is proud to accept FreedomWorks endorsement as well as their help in achieving our shared goals of lower taxes, a smaller federal government and more liberty for all Americans. We desperately need leaders in Washington who understand the power of the free market and the limitless potential of the American people. Wesley will fight for policies that remove needless red-tape and government regulation, and allow our economy to continue growing.

Together, we can flip this seat and bring conservative representation back to the 7th District!

Sincerely,
Team Hunt

****[CONTRIBUTE](http://links.wesleyfortexas.com/u/click?_t=fd5d6e7aa0334e7ebb096a39dc496016&_m=148b6c93f4a74efd8f4d0a5172368771&_e=a67QT58cV22WbuPzhaI8eSHlXFJ0P6eInKHN9OgzQMPUd9FBHy3TpHwve7f_fCWi0NWA4CWf3zCf05cgOg-bMXkg6vgBhOqUxdDCA4V-FUegDfH4-8LVguNqXtyv98njTSU-4o73NC2IYDSoNfHQ_YxJO7t0PTIjNdsMTcsX0F5eW5CVaRS1WK6ZieWEfBv6naM4M0vzQss0CK7KshvckZlpwQBD7-LfwfRoH-pyKJcPVBezPbV5-sLv-CycW9tE9SbK93edewB3WmaIuWHkf1ZvoqzCl4xQ8JN3gmUnJPM%3D)****
---

body:

Friend,

Since announcing my re-election campaign for Sheriff of Maricopa County, things have yet to go as expected.

And with **less than 24 hours** until my _critical_ November mid-month fundraising deadline, **[I still need 275 grassroots conservatives to support my campaign before midnight](http://links.action.supportarpaioforsheriff.com/u/click?_t=c4565dd37122495e8dd51204fa7fda1e&_m=9d163e3e75e94caab3034bbbdd233d00&_e=4KCJm-dqkW-EdZG9lyhJr30E1fvySUA3DKPEG3WXegwwMOGEz_ECqo8vp6STPJj37n4BVjWUbW4WAtWfJc5bI8yYkllVdAh1gGb2MT_TlgT_WHwlQ6xKgmPAkZx5_b8z2PmQD8kJIgCC5I_n2XKlMSWwmwWrBAgwMgSP6WtPzyJ7zXLzMlKQc-2zT9hkX2KOEtOXvO0TgLz2oQQXXjcLLquX5GlRnNlIc7OERfM4jfin5EVXFpV6J_OMXmVY49srUiyv-AaTh0Q3Ymp0koSx6hRbk4ydnurDljf-h95gOS84Gvw2cwRTAU0fJhFbSwyEMaK_bYLCj6LkQs0qbSz7HPpuMV7zMvIAI4z_Pe0JcubdrVpgQu3tYYslojDhk8sg)** – or I will be forced to drop out.
| [**MIDNIGHT DEADLINE
Help Joe Now »**](http://links.action.supportarpaioforsheriff.com/u/click?_t=c4565dd37122495e8dd51204fa7fda1e&_m=9d163e3e75e94caab3034bbbdd233d00&_e=4KCJm-dqkW-EdZG9lyhJr30E1fvySUA3DKPEG3WXegwwMOGEz_ECqo8vp6STPJj37n4BVjWUbW4WAtWfJc5bI8yYkllVdAh1gGb2MT_TlgT_WHwlQ6xKgmPAkZx5_b8z2PmQD8kJIgCC5I_n2XKlMSWwmwWrBAgwMgSP6WtPzyK3YxmKklnZNjQx-GF9fGB_K8HB2Wf7bv07FDtdt9bgYX5_dQzwTbPPqh8aEjaDFh3-1JjuWTeUWkC3HlvEAOwR-c6DR6r9LaNn98kl0zvKg7wljanF9o8A8-MGxsRbuEeu9eWMuVfe2qlHEAh_trPZEwUODHAIZEuGIk-S_rIZm5dQ0f23wirsANM0qi3L_xremj8ZZbUCN6nNxqkxHool)

Democrats think me campaigning on my old school, tough as nails approach to keeping America safe **_is helpless_** against their progressive agenda.

Man are they wrong.

Our country is desperate for proven leaders, like myself, to step up and take the challenges we’re facing head on.

But in order for me to win this race, build the Wall, and END the immigration crisis riddling our country – **[I need to hear from you before my midnight deadline.](http://links.action.supportarpaioforsheriff.com/u/click?_t=c4565dd37122495e8dd51204fa7fda1e&_m=9d163e3e75e94caab3034bbbdd233d00&_e=4KCJm-dqkW-EdZG9lyhJr30E1fvySUA3DKPEG3WXegwwMOGEz_ECqo8vp6STPJj37n4BVjWUbW4WAtWfJc5bI8yYkllVdAh1gGb2MT_TlgT_WHwlQ6xKgmPAkZx5_b8z2PmQD8kJIgCC5I_n2XKlMSWwmwWrBAgwMgSP6WtPzyKwR-ffbfDS95DD2v_8GgLbw-yUdScMi6ebtLm2zsHj_eL0-cCREEPStA1WOYDMLMpWPQQrajEgcya48KxuMqPXCixqxaZgDpdQIRtuBQxurtHHLxCtfxDl_WFNw7So9FiXsjr0MKb_ONg8rj18jtEH148WWi-UhF2DUkdOIu74pKOhzNh6hBZRp-kMrcsCP1NCi6E_AoiDBzBJ8cj0laAp)**

For America,

Sheriff Joe Arpaio

body:

Republicans couldn't hold on to the most powerful statewide seats with Trump's full backing in an R+15 state. Sadly, we know Mitch doesn't listen to the will of voters or even care what they think \-- he only cares about continuing his reign of hypocrisy and conservative stonewalling in the Senate. name: J.D. Scholten
subject: Peter, I refuse to spread Steve King's hate, so I won't include his latest tweets in this email
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Scholten4Iowa Campaign Committee
body:
---
Peter --

Sometimes you have to give credit where it is due, and I tip my hat to Sen. Grassley for talking about the importance of protecting the whistleblower.

Where’s Steve King on the issue? He showed his hand in two tweets yesterday (one of which he deleted).

I'm not going to include Steve King's latest tweets in this email for you to see because I don’t want to spread his conspiracy theories or his anti-Semitic rhetoric.

**[But I am going to call on you to add your name to a petition telling Congress to condemn Steve King’s actions for spreading false, anti-Semitic conspiracy theories that could endanger the life of an innocent person.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/11898051/121681693/1346899991?mscode=em19_191115_scholtenkingresponse&refcode=em19_191115_scholtenkingresponse&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDEvMS82MTU4MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxOTRmZDM0ZC1lNTA3LWVhMTEtODI4Yi0yODE4Nzg0ZDZkNjgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=rQB8fYRlz765ufryQYLz71ZFd7_pFeHpHnlP9VQweKI=&emci=90f5d0f0-2b07-ea11-828b-2818784d6d68&emdi=194fd34d-e507-ea11-828b-2818784d6d68&ceid=6658013)**
[ADD YOUR NAME](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/11898052/121681695/1346899991?mscode=em19_191115_scholtenkingresponse&refcode=em19_191115_scholtenkingresponse&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDEvMS82MTU4MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxOTRmZDM0ZC1lNTA3LWVhMTEtODI4Yi0yODE4Nzg0ZDZkNjgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=rQB8fYRlz765ufryQYLz71ZFd7_pFeHpHnlP9VQweKI=&emci=90f5d0f0-2b07-ea11-828b-2818784d6d68&emdi=194fd34d-e507-ea11-828b-2818784d6d68&ceid=6658013)
Regardless of one's views on impeachment, we should all stand tall with whistleblowers who report government corruption. When there’s a house fire, it doesn’t matter who called 911.

King thinks it’s cute to threaten to expose the whistleblower -- which is dangerous to both our democracy and to the brave individual who risked his or her career to come forward.

**[Join our movement, help us defeat Steve King, and show the world that America rejects his hate and stands tall with whistleblowers.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/11898053/121681697/1346899991?mscode=em19_191115_scholtenkingresponse&refcode=em19_191115_scholtenkingresponse&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDEvMS82MTU4MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxOTRmZDM0ZC1lNTA3LWVhMTEtODI4Yi0yODE4Nzg0ZDZkNjgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=rQB8fYRlz765ufryQYLz71ZFd7_pFeHpHnlP9VQweKI=&emci=90f5d0f0-2b07-ea11-828b-2818784d6d68&emdi=194fd34d-e507-ea11-828b-2818784d6d68&ceid=6658013)**

clean_body: Peter -- Sometimes you have to give credit where it is due, and I tip my hat to Sen. Grassley for talking about the importance of protecting the whistleblower. Where’s Steve King on the issue? He showed his hand in two tweets yesterday (one of which he deleted). I'm not going to include Steve King's latest tweets in this email for you to see because I don’t want to spread his conspiracy theories or his anti-Semitic rhetoric. Regardless of one's views on impeachment, we should all stand tall with whistleblowers who report government corruption. When there’s a house fire, it doesn’t matter who called 911. King thinks it’s cute to threaten to expose the whistleblower -- which is dangerous to both our democracy and to the brave individual who risked his or her career to come forward. Standing Tall for All, J.D. Scholten =

Ben Ray Lujan is running to be the first Hispanic Senator from New Mexico in more than 40 years. No one like Ben Ray has ever run for Senate before. He led the charge to take back the House for the American people and Democrats (and succeeded by a historic margin) and now he's running to take back the Senate too.

We know we send you a lot of emails, but that's because Ben Ray isn't taking a cent of corporate PAC money. His campaign is 100% people-powered. And the polls show we have a once-in-a-lifetime shot to finally defeat Mitch McConnell and take back the Senate. But we can't do this without winning New Mexico. Will you be a part of this historic movement?

body:

Mike Turner stood front and center and made his concerns very clear: [_**neither of the witnesses offering testimony had any contact with President Trump on Ukraine or any issue at all!**_](http://links.mail1.digitalcampaignstrategies.com/ctt?kn=34&ms=NDExMjEyOTcS1&r=ODQ4NzI0NzcxNjgxS0&b=0&j=MTY0MTM1NDk1NQS2&mt=1&rt=0)

\---------- Forwarded message ---------
From: Mike Turner
Date: Wed, Nov 13 2019 at 8:18 PM
Subject: Impeachment agenda continues...
Peter,
Today, Nancy Pelosi and Adam Schiff pushed their partisan impeachment agenda out and in the open.
I stood up and made my concerns very clear: [_**the two first up witnesses offering testimony neither had any contact with the President of the United States on Ukraine or on any issue at all!**_](http://links.mail1.digitalcampaignstrategies.com/ctt?kn=11&ms=NDExMjEyOTcS1&r=ODQ4NzI0NzcxNjgxS0&b=0&j=MTY0MTM1NDk1NQS2&mt=1&rt=0)
Do the Democrats know that this impeachment hearing is in fact about the President?
This process has truly been a flawed one from the beginning. This public hearing started as a closed door impeachment investigation. Holding meetings in basement hearing rooms in the Capitol, Adam Schiff has been hiding something, hiding this flawed process from the American people, who have long deserved to know what is going on.
[_**We cannot allow them to continue this partisan impeachment agenda!**_](http://links.mail1.digitalcampaignstrategies.com/ctt?kn=10&ms=NDExMjEyOTcS1&r=ODQ4NzI0NzcxNjgxS0&b=0&j=MTY0MTM1NDk1NQS2&mt=1&rt=0)
Secrecy has no place in Congress. I believe in upholding the Constitution and with that, transparency in government. Pelosi and Schiff have demonstrated their disregard for both of these in this process.
Join with me and House Republicans to stand up to Schiff, Pelosi, and impeachment today and tomorrow. The media and the Democrats were preparing their narratives even before today's testimony was presented. Does that seem appropriate to you?
If you agree like I do that [_**Pelosi and Adam Schiff should drop this politically motivated investigation - please rush in $75, $45, $35, or Any Amount to stop this partisan impeachment process today?**_](http://links.mail1.digitalcampaignstrategies.com/ctt?kn=19&ms=NDExMjEyOTcS1&r=ODQ4NzI0NzcxNjgxS0&b=0&j=MTY0MTM1NDk1NQS2&mt=1&rt=0)

Mike Turner

name: Finance Update via Bennet for America
subject: missing our goal?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Bennet for America
body:
| |
---
| Team -

Polling over the last few weeks shows that a record-high number of voters in this race are still undecided.

At midnight, we'll be sending Michael the final numbers on our $15,OOO mid-month fundraising goal, [but right now we're still $7,468 short.](https://secure.michaelbennet.com/page/m/35cbae2b/134673f2/985bf10/6997d111/4004541454/VEsH/?g=GUSlGlH8x8Vcy9-bgCeB4mA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/bfa-november?refcode=EM_FR_B1_111519_AC_ND&recurring=auto&amount=5&amounts=10,35,50,100,250,500,1000")

Reaching this goal means we can keep opening offices. It means we can keep hiring field organizers. And it means we can keep knocking doors to talk to the more than 70% of undecided voters in this race.

[We need four more donations from Cresco to help close the gap and reach our fundraising goal! We can't do this without you, team, will you step up?](https://secure.michaelbennet.com/page/m/35cbae2b/134673f2/985bf10/6997d111/4004541454/VEsE/?g=GUSlGlH8x8Vcy9-bgCeB4mA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/bfa-november?refcode=EM_FR_B1_111519_AC_ND&recurring=auto&amount=5&amounts=10,35,50,100,250,500,1000")

name: Joe Kennedy III
subject: A very short email about why Donald Trump should be impeached
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Kennedy for Massachusetts
body:
| [](https://secure.kennedyforma.com/page/m/3639094b/55b66746/2cfb2dd7/80f225c/57843032/VEsH/?g=wJ6aEDjfd5ldgcs4t9rIVg "http://www.kennedyforma.com/")
---

| | Have you been following the impeachment hearings? **Let's just stay focused on the facts:** Russian and Ukraine are at war. Thousands of people have been killed over the last five years. The United States has supported our ally Ukraine because it is in the clear national security interest of the American people to act when a sovereign nation's borders are violated. **_But then President Trump decided to withhold that support in order to further his own personal, political gain._** It's really that simple. He put his own interests above the national security of the American people. Donald Trump's allies can shout, evade, distract, and point fingers. But the facts are right there in front of us. They are not disputed. And they're not going away. **This president should be impeached and he should be removed from office.** Express Donate: If you've stored your info with ActBlue Express, we'll process your contribution instantly: | [$5](https://secure.kennedyforma.com/page/m/3639094b/55b66746/2cfb2dd7/80f225d/57843032/VEsE/p/eyJlM3RpZFhSMGIyNWZiMjVsZlgwPSI6IjUifQ%3D%3D/?g=wJ6aEDjfd5ldgcs4t9rIVg "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/stand-with-joe?express_lane=true&amount=5&refcode=2019-11-15-impeachment&refcode2=express-buttons") | [$15](https://secure.kennedyforma.com/page/m/3639094b/55b66746/2cfb2dd7/80f225e/57843032/VEsF/p/eyJlM3RpZFhSMGIyNWZkSGR2ZlgwPSI6IjE1In0%3D/?g=wJ6aEDjfd5ldgcs4t9rIVg "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/stand-with-joe?express_lane=true&amount=15&refcode=2019-11-15-impeachment&refcode2=express-buttons") | [$25](https://secure.kennedyforma.com/page/m/3639094b/55b66746/2cfb2dd7/80f225f/57843032/VEsC/p/eyJlM3RpZFhSMGIyNWZkR2h5WldWOWZRPT0iOiIyNSJ9/?g=wJ6aEDjfd5ldgcs4t9rIVg "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/stand-with-joe?express_lane=true&amount=25&refcode=2019-11-15-impeachment&refcode2=express-buttons") | [$50](https://secure.kennedyforma.com/page/m/3639094b/55b66746/2cfb2dd7/80f2258/57843032/VEsD/p/eyJlM3RpZFhSMGIyNWZabTkxY24xOSI6IjUwIn0%3D/?g=wJ6aEDjfd5ldgcs4t9rIVg "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/stand-with-joe?express_lane=true&amount=50&refcode=2019-11-15-impeachment&refcode2=express-buttons")

name: When Democrats Turn Out
subject: LIVE POLL: Trump trying to distract from Yovanovitch testimony
disclaimer_text: Paid for by When Democrats Turn Out PAC
body:
|
---

| | Hi Peter, Marie Yovanovitch, former ambassador to Ukraine, is currently testifying before Congress, and she is not holding back. In her opening statement, she harshly criticized Trump for his hollowing out of the State Department, weakening our country's interests at home and abroad. Additionally, she placed blame squarely on the president for broadcasting globally exactly how to pressure him into subverting those trying to fight corruption. Trump has \-- as per usual when facing criticism from a woman \-- taken to Twitter to smear Ambassador Yovanovitch to distract from her searing testimony. Democrats in the House are moving forward and pursuing justice while Republicans refuse to acknowledge the legitimacy of the inquiry and continue trying to convince the electorate \-- by seeing who can yell the loudest \-- that this is a "witch hunt" and nothing more. We need to know how today's testimony is impacting public opinion, so we NEED to know where you stand: **Do you support impeaching Donald Trump?** [YES](https://turnoutpac.bsd.net/page/m/78bcdc3c/6e9863e8/167f029f/1db09007/230256390/VEsH/?g=mj_BT60LBwxdW4nnt4whVXA "https://s.surveyplanet.com/1A4_JIyk") [NO](https://turnoutpac.bsd.net/page/m/78bcdc3c/6e9863e8/167f029f/1db09007/230256390/VEsE/?g=mj_BT60LBwxdW4nnt4whVXA "https://s.surveyplanet.com/1A4_JIyk") Thank you in advance for your feedback \-- we couldn't do this work without you, The WDTO Team [DONATE](https://turnoutpac.bsd.net/page/m/78bcdc3c/6e9863e8/167f029f/1db09006/230256390/VEsF/?g=mj_BT60LBwxdW4nnt4whVXA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/when-democrats-turn-out-nd?refcode=OUT20191115d.ND-b&refcode2=6g4Hc4DsnbWav8GbOFsn")

name: Jason Lewis
subject: Call for help from ALL 87 MN counties!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Jason Lewis for Senate
body:
We have big plans over the next 45 days... and we have a simple request today to keep our efforts on track.
[ ](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/5b71fafb5ba1f9d636ff93d4ab7bd0b7/33183/261838f57c7b8c1d/24376ba17e258a9bc3d6b838967d376c/33183) Fellow Conservative, We have big plans over the next 45 days... and we have a simple request today to keep our efforts on track. **[Will you chip in $8.70 to help us expose Tina Smith’s radical-left agenda?](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/5b71fafb5ba1f9d636ff93d4ab7bd0b7/33183/261838f57c7b8c1d/6f4f9c9d66938815c3d6b838967d376c/33183)** We have 87 counties in Minnesota, and today we’re just looking for at least ONE supporter from each county to chip in. That’s all it will take to meet our immediate online shortfall. _Every dollar we raise will help us reach voters and build our conservative momentum!_ **[Tap or click here](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/5b71fafb5ba1f9d636ff93d4ab7bd0b7/33183/261838f57c7b8c1d/beb22b470b873e1bc3d6b838967d376c/33183)** to be the first supporter from your county to respond! [ Contribute $8.70 here >>> ](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/5b71fafb5ba1f9d636ff93d4ab7bd0b7/33183/261838f57c7b8c1d/e8d6c2f95332a66dc3d6b838967d376c/33183) You know what’s at stake in 2020, Fellow Conservative. Today’s Democrat establishment is led by people like impeachment cheerleaders Ilhan Omar and Tina Smith, who represent the extreme views of the coastal elites like Nancy Pelosi and AOC – NOT the values and priorities of common-sense Minnesotans! **We can WIN this U.S. Senate race, and help re-elect President Trump. But we can’t do it without committed conservatives across Minnesota on board.** I’m anxious to see where people step up to help. Again, we’re just looking for one supporter from your to meet our goal. **[Be one of 87 Minnesotans to help keep up the fight to TAKE BACK Minnesota from the socialist Democrats!](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/5b71fafb5ba1f9d636ff93d4ab7bd0b7/33183/261838f57c7b8c1d/aeac69d5cf866542c3d6b838967d376c/33183)** \- Jason id:2019-10-28-16:42:29:207t [ Contribute $8.70 here >>> ](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/5b71fafb5ba1f9d636ff93d4ab7bd0b7/33183/261838f57c7b8c1d/f67b22cc42d2927ec3d6b838967d376c/33183) | |

name: Mark Warner HQ
subject: Can we count on you?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Mark Warner
body:
Even after our success in the Virginia elections, the Trump campaign is doubling down on Virginia.
|
---
| | Derek,

Even after our success in the Virginia elections, the Trump campaign is doubling down on Virginia. In the past week, they've held four Trump Victory Initiative events in Virginia and announced several more. Their goal is simple: _recruit and turn out voters to re-elect Donald Trump and beat Mark Warner._

If the Trump campaign is stepping up its investments in Virginia, then we can't afford to be complacent. We've started to see an alarming decline in donations since last week's elections, so we've set a 100 new donor mid-month goal to help us stay on track. **Will you chip in before midnight to make sure Mark doesn't fall behind?** _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ **[DONATE "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/warner-48hrgoalnd?refcode=20191115nd__340__&refcode2=express_lane_other")** **Your gift toward our mid-month goal is an investment in keeping Virginia blue in 2020.** If Republicans flip Virginia, there's very little hope of taking back the Senate or the White House.

Mark is putting together a grassroots campaign operation that will build on last week's victories and help elect Democrats up and down the ballot in 2020 and for years to come. With the Trump campaign continuing to build its own turnout operation here in Virginia, we can't afford to fall behind on our fundraising goals. If we do, we'll have to start scaling back our efforts.

That's what's at stake, Derek. **[Can we count on you to chip in towards our mid-month goal before midnight and help us stay on track?](https://act.markwarnerva.com/page/m/7e85d7aa/53d9897e/53d9e1bf/1c89e06b/424893776/VEsB/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjM0MCJ9/?g=fQCtPq_HJ6FdDGwS5GeylnA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/warner-48hrgoalnd?refcode=20191115nd__340__&refcode2=ask1&amount=5")**

-- Team Warner | **[CONTRIBUTE](https://act.markwarnerva.com/page/m/7e85d7aa/53d9897e/53d9e1bf/1c89e069/424893776/VEsO/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjM0MCJ9/?g=fQCtPq_HJ6FdDGwS5GeylnA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/warner-48hrgoalnd?refcode=20191115nd__340__&refcode2=cont&amount=5")**
