name: Shannon Salk, Team Hickenlooper
subject: 24 hours
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Hickenlooper for Colorado
body:
Thanks to Donald Trump, Cory Gardner has had a big month - let's make sure we can keep pace. | | | [](https://secure.hickenlooper.com/page/m/63771448/691c9bd/6f8e6e83/11a7ee1d/3374273188/VEsH/?g=Wvb-QcQot1BcsCb456pUfvA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hickenlooperforco-em-nov?refcode=em_template")
---
| | Cory Gardner has had a big month, thanks to Donald Trump. We've set a goal of raising $100,000 by Saturday night to make sure we can keep up. **Can you chip in?**

[](https://secure.hickenlooper.?g=Wvb-QcQot1BcsCb456pUfvA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hickenlooperforco-em-nov?refcode=em_fr_20191115_SS_20191115-fr-SS-midmonthkick2-2mo_2mo_callout&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Cresco&state=&occupation=&employer=")
---

Team,

I'll get straight to the point. Over the next 24 hours, we're hoping to raise $100,000 to help counter Cory Gardner's fundraising haul last week. [**_Can you chip in $28 right now to make sure we hit that goal?_**](https://secure.hickenlooper.?g=Wvb-QcQot1BcsCb456pUfvA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hickenlooperforco-em-nov?refcode=em_fr_20191115_SS_20191115-fr-SS-midmonthkick2-2mo_2mo_l1&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Cresco&state=&occupation=&employer=")

We don't know exactly how much he's raised, but we do know that Gardner has had a big month--thanks to Donald Trump.

Trump has been out fundraising for vulnerable Republican senators, and Gardner has been at the top of his list. The president even asked his online supporters to get involved for "having his back on impeachment," which we hear raised $100,000 for Gardner alone.

Time and again we've proven that a grassroots team like ours can compete dollar-for-dollar with Gardner's allies in Washington, no matter how powerful or wealthy they are. So while we have no illusions about how difficult it's going to be to raise $100,000 in 24 hours, I know we can pull it off.

**Contribute whatever you can right now and help make sure we can close this fundraising gap:**
_If you've saved your information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through right away._
[**_DONATE $5 NOW_**](https://secure.hickenlooper.?g=Wvb-QcQot1BcsCb456pUfvA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hickenlooperforco-em-nov?express_lane=true&amount=5&refcode=em_fr_20191115_SS_20191115-fr-SS-midmonthkick2-2mo_2mo_expresslane5&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Cresco&state=&occupation=&employer=")

[** _DONATE $10 NOW_**](https://secure.hickenlooper.?g=Wvb-QcQot1BcsCb456pUfvA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hickenlooperforco-em-nov?express_lane=true&amount=10&refcode=em_fr_20191115_SS_20191115-fr-SS-midmonthkick2-2mo_2mo_expresslane10&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Cresco&state=&occupation=&employer=")

[** _DONATE $25 NOW_**](https://secure.hickenlooper.?g=Wvb-QcQot1BcsCb456pUfvA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hickenlooperforco-em-nov?express_lane=true&amount=25&refcode=em_fr_20191115_SS_20191115-fr-SS-midmonthkick2-2mo_2mo_expresslane25&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Cresco&state=&occupation=&employer=")

[** _DONATE $50 NOW_**](https://secure.hickenlooper.?g=Wvb-QcQot1BcsCb456pUfvA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hickenlooperforco-em-nov?express_lane=true&amount=50&refcode=em_fr_20191115_SS_20191115-fr-SS-midmonthkick2-2mo_2mo_expresslane50&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Cresco&state=&occupation=&employer=")

[** _DONATE $100 NOW_**](https://secure.hickenlooper.?g=Wvb-QcQot1BcsCb456pUfvA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hickenlooperforco-em-nov?express_lane=true&amount=100&refcode=em_fr_20191115_SS_20191115-fr-SS-midmonthkick2-2mo_2mo_expresslane100&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Cresco&state=&occupation=&employer=")

[** _DONATE ANOTHER AMOUNT_**](https://secure.hickenlooper.?g=Wvb-QcQot1BcsCb456pUfvA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hickenlooperforco-em-nov?refcode=em_fr_20191115_SS_20191115-fr-SS-midmonthkick2-2mo_2mo_expresslaneother&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Cresco&state=&occupation=&employer=")
Thank you,
Shannon
Shannon Salk
National Finance Director
Hickenlooper for Colorado
[](https://secure.hickenlooper.?g=Wvb-QcQot1BcsCb456pUfvA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hickenlooperforco-em-nov?refcode=em_fr_20191115_SS_20191115-fr-SS-midmonthkick2-2mo_2mo_contribbutton&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Cresco&state=&occupation=&employer=")

| | Paid for by Hickenlooper for Colorado
---

P.O. Box 18886, Denver, CO 80218
Contributions or gifts to Hickenlooper for Colorado are not tax deductible.
If you got this message from a friend, you can join the Hickenlooper for Colorado team by **[_signing up right here_](https://secure.hickenlooper.com/page/m/63771448/691c9bd/6f8e6e83/11a7ee13/3374273188/VEsHBA/?g=Wvb-QcQot1BcsCb456pUfvA "https://secure.hickenlooper.com/page/s/sign-up?source=em_footer")**.
Keep us company on the campaign trail by joining us on [_**Facebook**_](https://secure.hickenlooper.com/page/m/63771448/691c9bd/6f8e6e83/11a7ee10/3374273188/VEsHBw/?g=Wvb-QcQot1BcsCb456pUfvA "https://www.facebook.com/JohnHickenlooper/"), [_**Twitter**_](https://secure.hickenlooper.com/page/m/63771448/691c9bd/6f8e6e83/11a7ee11/3374273188/VEsHBg/?g=Wvb-QcQot1BcsCb456pUfvA "https://twitter.com/hickenlooper"), [_**Instagram**_](https://secure.hickenlooper.com/page/m/63771448/691c9bd/6f8e6e83/11a7ee0e/3374273188/VEsHAQ/?g=Wvb-QcQot1BcsCb456pUfvA "https://www.instagram.com/johnhickenlooper/"), and [_**YouTube**_](https://secure.hickenlooper.com/page/m/63771448/691c9bd/6f8e6e83/11a7ee0f/3374273188/VEsHAA/?g=Wvb-QcQot1BcsCb456pUfvA "https://www.youtube.com/channel/UC82O0Byp_ny13O0LkO1UpUg/featured").
We love staying connected to you--and these emails are the best way to stay up to date with the latest on this campaign. But if at any point you'd like to stop receiving these messages, you can unsubscribe [here](https://secure.hickenlooper.com/page/m/63771448/691c9bd/6f8e6e83/11a7ee0c/3374273188/VEsHAw/p/eyJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSJ9/?g=Wvb-QcQot1BcsCb456pUfvA "https://secure.hickenlooper.com/page/unsubscribe?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com").
If we're not reaching you at the correct email address, please update your information [_**here**_](https://secure.hickenlooper.com/page/m/63771448/691c9bd/6f8e6e83/11a7ee13/3374273188/VEsHAg/?g=Wvb-QcQot1BcsCb456pUfvA "https://secure.hickenlooper.com/page/s/sign-up?source=em_footer").

name: Team Yang
subject: We’re now less than one week out from the Atlanta debate
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Andrew Yang
body:
| [](http://act.yang2020.com/go/68?t=1&akid=3145%2E377263%2EevJKdw) Yang Gang --

We did it! Our ad will stay on air for another week because you and the rest of the Yang Gang stepped up once again. Even more voters will be introduced to Andrew’s new way forward.

Andrew’s favorite part of campaigning is you. He’s always talking about how he views every member of the Yang Gang **as newfound friends.** And Evelyn, after her first campaign appearance, walked away feeling energized by all the support she saw.

Now, we’re less than one week away from the Atlanta debate and Andrew is getting ready. **It would give his debate prep a boost if he saw how many individual contributions came in to get him to the December debate.**

**[Contribute whatever you can afford right now and we’ll let Andrew know just how many people are cheering him on today!](https://act.yang2020.com/go/16863?t=5&akid=3145%2E377263%2EevJKdw)** | [Cheer on andrew](https://act.yang2020.com/go/16863?t=7&akid=3145%2E377263%2EevJKdw)
---
Thanks for being in this with all of us,

Team Yang
**We don't have corporate PACs or big donors who can close the fundraising gap we face, just grassroots donors like you powering this campaign. Please give now.** | [Contribute](https://act.yang2020.com/go/16863?t=6&akid=3145%2E377263%2EevJKdw)
---

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. We're proud you're part of the Yang Gang! But if you want to receive less email from us, you can do that [here.](https://act.yang2020.com/signup/email-actionkit-feweremails-20190821/?t=2&akid=3145%2E377263%2EevJKdw) And if you absolutely don't want to hear from us again you can [unsubscribe here.](https://act.yang2020.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe?t=3&akid=3145%2E377263%2EevJKdw) Contributions or gifts to Friends of Andrew Yang are not tax deductible. | Paid for by Friends of Andrew Yang

name: =?utf-8?Q?Team=20LaTurner?=
subject: ❄The weather is cold, but we're keeping the road hot ☀
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Kansans for LaTurner
body:
The weather is cold, but we're keeping the road hot | | | |
---
| | | The weather may be cooling off, but that is not slowing down Team LaTurner! We continue to travel the district so we can continue to get to know you and serve you best.
[Would you pitch in some gas money to help us on our way?](https://jakelaturner.us4.list-manage.com/track/click?u=e36c5b1e49908a49477cee2b3&id=58dcd52de1&e=1050d051da)
Here are few of the notes from our latest adventures in the 2nd Congressional District.
---
|
---
| | **Leavenworth Veterans Day Parade**
---
| [ ](https://jakelaturner.us4.list-manage.com/track/click?u=e36c5b1e49908a49477cee2b3&id=993a6e4673&e=1050d051da)
---
| [ ](https://jakelaturner.us4.list-manage.com/track/click?u=e36c5b1e49908a49477cee2b3&id=ae0afd6f13&e=1050d051da)
---
[ ](https://jakelaturner.us4.list-manage.com/track/click?u=e36c5b1e49908a49477cee2b3&id=11505cb3ad&e=1050d051da)
---
| | When it's Veterans Day in Leavenworth, Kansas, the parade goes on snow or shine. [Braving the cold on Veterans Day morning](https://jakelaturner.us4.list-manage.com/track/click?u=e36c5b1e49908a49477cee2b3&id=e3d65f57df&e=1050d051da) gave us an ever greater appreciation of the sacrifices of the men and women who have bravely fought for our country. God bless our veterans at home and abroad. We owe them a great debt of gratitude for their honorable service.
---
|
---
| [ ](https://jakelaturner.us4.list-manage.com/track/click?u=e36c5b1e49908a49477cee2b3&id=656d397db0&e=1050d051da)
---
**Montgomery County GOP Chili Feed** We loved meeting with the folks in [Independence this fall at their annual Chili Feed](https://jakelaturner.us4.list-manage.com/track/click?u=e36c5b1e49908a49477cee2b3&id=0b256a6cb4&e=1050d051da). It's an exciting time to be a member of the GOP in Kansas. We need all the help of these and other wonderful volunteers to make sure we get our message out that America's core values are under attack. We must support our President and elect good Republican fighters who will stand with him.
|
---
| | **Leavenworth County GOP Candidate Kickoff**
---
| [ ](https://jakelaturner.us4.list-manage.com/track/click?u=e36c5b1e49908a49477cee2b3&id=dc99fed45a&e=1050d051da)

[ ](https://jakelaturner.us4.list-manage.com/track/click?u=e36c5b1e49908a49477cee2b3&id=1d80fc4329&e=1050d051da)

| The Leavenworth County Republican Party has long been known for it's strength and commitment to fighting for our conservative principles. It was great to meet with these dedicated members of the GOP. [I enjoyed the opportunity to speak with them about my candidacy for U.S. Congress](https://jakelaturner.us4.list-manage.com/track/click?u=e36c5b1e49908a49477cee2b3&id=16976e57e6&e=1050d051da), and my resolve to stand with President Trump in 2020.

**Washburn University Homecoming** Our crew at the [Washburn University Homecoming parade](https://jakelaturner.us4.list-manage.com/track/click?u=e36c5b1e49908a49477cee2b3&id=4b12bd6859&e=1050d051da) enjoyed a much more sunny and beautiful day for walking in a parade. ---

disclaimer_text: Paid for by Finello for Congress |
body:
Hi Peter,

Quick update: we’re STILL short, but we’re getting there! So many friends and supporters jumped in to help us hit today’s goal after we fell short yesterday. Thank YOU so much if you’ve already given toward our goal \-- my family and I appreciate your support more than words can express.

We’re closing in on our goal now with just $180 left to raise. We know we can win here because Hillary Clinton, Gov. Wolf, and Sen. Casey ALL won this seat, and just last week, Democrats won BIG TIME in Bucks County. National Republicans are worried about this race though, so they’re going to funnel dark, outside money into PA-01 to lift up my corporate PAC-funded opponent.

We can win, but I can’t fight off his corporate dollars without your support. Please donate so we can make up the last $180 we need to stay on track \-- this race is too important to lose.

Please, pitch in here: [**https://secure.actblue.com/donate/finelloforcongress**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/11902567/121732588/2063951955?refcode=CFN20191115b&refcode2=KKgAi4mp5GufwMF8MXYY&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83NjUyMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3NzBkY2RkNy1mZjA3LWVhMTEtODI4Yi0yODE4Nzg0ZDZkNjgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=2Mr6v4Lxui67YGXmmh9lWRx7YulUBg9NiwLGliDPYqM=)

disclaimer_text: Paid for by Franken for Iowa
body:
Just a few days ago, we sent out a survey asking for your take on our health-care system, and your responses were overwhelming!
|
---
| |

name: Kamala Harris
subject: Minnesota needs us
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Tina Smith for Minnesota
body:
This is a critical time: The Republicans are planning to pour as many resources as possible into Minnesota, and if we're going to take back the Senate in 2020, I need you to support Tina Smith.

| [](https://action.tinaforminnesota.?g=YCjTcDpTVzRarKyUt8_RZpA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tsm-em191115-kdh?refcode=em191115-kdh&recurring=yes&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=PA&phone=&employer=&occupation=") Friend, this is a critical time.

**Minnesota is right in the path for Democrats to be able to take back the Senate. And that's why I'm asking for your help today to defend Tina Smith.**

Tina's fighting hard for working people in the Senate. She's standing up to powerful special interests and getting to work to solve problems for Minnesotans. And it is why we need to keep her in the Senate.

But Tina is taking on an extreme right-wing opponent who is already endorsed by Donald Trump. Minnesota could be key to the Republicans' hold on their Senate majority, so we cannot take any chances in this race.

**Right now, Tina needs to bring in as much grassroots support as possible to take on her opponent and hit her online fundraising goal.**

**[Will you rush $10 or as much as you can today to make sure Tina can meet her mid-quarter fundraising goal?](https://action.tinaforminnesota.?g=YCjTcDpTVzRarKyUt8_RZpA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tsm-em191115-kdh?refcode=em191115-kdh&recurring=yes&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=PA&phone=&employer=&occupation=&amount=10")** **[Donate Now](https://action.tinaforminnesota.?g=YCjTcDpTVzRarKyUt8_RZpA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tsm-em191115-kdh?refcode=em191115-kdh&recurring=yes&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=PA&phone=&employer=&occupation=&amount=10")** We can take back the Senate in 2020 -- but we have to protect Tina's seat to do so. After Trump narrowly lost Minnesota in 2016, the Republicans will be pouring their resources into this state, and Tina needs our help so she can fight back and keep standing up for Minnesotans.

**[Will you join me in supporting Tina? Pitch in $10 today so Tina can meet her mid-quarter fundraising goal and we can take back the Senate.](https://action.tinaforminnesota.?g=YCjTcDpTVzRarKyUt8_RZpA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tsm-em191115-kdh?refcode=em191115-kdh&recurring=yes&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=PA&phone=&employer=&occupation=&amount=10")** **[Donate Now](https://action.tinaforminnesota.?g=YCjTcDpTVzRarKyUt8_RZpA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tsm-em191115-kdh?refcode=em191115-kdh&recurring=yes&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=PA&phone=&employer=&occupation=&amount=10")** Join me,

Kamala Harris
---

name: =?utf-8?Q?OBAMA=E2=80=99S_ANNOUNCEMENT_=28via_Team_Ben_Ray=29?=
subject: RE: Barack Obama
disclaimer_text: Paid for and authorized by People for Ben
body:
---
| | **[_A beloved president asked you to step up and help flip the Senate. Will you answer President Obama 's call before the mid-month deadline in 12 hours? Rush $5 to elect Ben Ray and DEFEAT McConnell's Republican Senate! >>_](https://secure.benrlujan.%3D/?g=YeDMcDpTVzRcsCgKwv9UzQ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/brl_email?refcode=20191115_em_fr_b2_oav_all_rs&recurring=auto&amount=5&amounts=25,50,100,250")** **FIRST:** President Obama called us to action in a powerful way. | [](https://secure.benrlujan.%3D/?g=YeDMcDpTVzRcsCgKwv9UzQ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/brl_email?refcode=20191115_em_fr_b2_oav_all_rs&recurring=auto&amount=5&amounts=25,50,100,250")
---

body:
Here's what's going on: We have big plans to ramp up MJ's travel schedule and build out our team...

|
---
[](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/6489081f/7f51f7bc/4bd79b95/4ef0a407/1348715189/VEsH/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/logo?refcode=emaillogo&amount=5")

| | _Roll Call_ :
Sen. Cornyn is one of the 10 most vulnerable senators!
**[MJ Hegar is ready to take him on. Pitch in now>>>](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/6489081f/7f51f7bc/4bd79b95/4ef0a406/1348715189/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjUxNSJ9/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-lessthan1yr?refcode=email_20191115.2nd__515__&amount=10&recurring=true")** Hi, Peter,

I'm MJ's Deputy Finance Director. It's my job to make sure we're on track to hit every budget goal we set, so I'll be blunt -- we're behind where we need to be. (**[Pitch in to help us get back on track>>>](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/6489081f/7f51f7bc/4bd79b95/4ef0a406/1348715189/VEsF/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjUxNSJ9/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-lessthan1yr?refcode=email_20191115.2nd__515__&amount=10&recurring=true")**)

Here's what's going on: **_We have big plans for 2020, but to take on a nearly 20-year incumbent we need to stay on track every single month._** There's still time to close the gap, but we need you to **[chip in now](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/6489081f/7f51f7bc/4bd79b95/4ef0a406/1348715189/VEsC/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjUxNSJ9/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-lessthan1yr?refcode=email_20191115.2nd__515__&amount=10&recurring=true")** to get us there.

November is always a hard month for fundraising with the holidays just around the corner. But we can't afford to let our fundraising numbers slip. **_Roll Call_ just ranked Sen. Cornyn as one of the 10 most vulnerable senators, and now is the time to capitalize. Will you rush a donation to help us beat him?** | _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_
---
**[Express donate $5>>](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/6489081f/7f51f7bc/4bd79b95/4ef0a405/1348715189/VEsD/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjUxNSJ9/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-lessthan1yr?express_lane=true&refcode=email_20191115.2nd__515__&amount=5")**
**[Express donate $10>>](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/6489081f/7f51f7bc/4bd79b95/4ef0a404/1348715189/VEsA/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjUxNSJ9/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-lessthan1yr?express_lane=true&refcode=email_20191115.2nd__515__&amount=10")**
**[Express donate $25>>](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/6489081f/7f51f7bc/4bd79b95/4ef0a47b/1348715189/VEsB/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjUxNSJ9/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-lessthan1yr?express_lane=true&refcode=email_20191115.2nd__515__&amount=25")**
**[Express donate $50>>](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/6489081f/7f51f7bc/4bd79b95/4ef0a47a/1348715189/VEsO/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjUxNSJ9/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-lessthan1yr?express_lane=true&refcode=email_20191115.2nd__515__&amount=50")**
**[Or, donate a different amount>>](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/6489081f/7f51f7bc/4bd79b95/4ef0a479/1348715189/VEsP/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjUxNSJ9/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-lessthan1yr?refcode=email_20191115.2nd__515__")**
Sen. Cornyn is trying to buy his reelection with an $11 million war chest filled with special interest dollars. We don't have that kind of money -- and we still have a primary to win and thousands of miles to travel across Texas. MJ and the whole team are working incredibly hard, but we can only win this race with your help. **[Will you pitch in right now so we can pick up the pace to hit our November goal?](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/6489081f/7f51f7bc/4bd79b95/4ef0a406/1348715189/VEsHBQ/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjUxNSJ9/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-lessthan1yr?refcode=email_20191115.2nd__515__&amount=10&recurring=true")**

We are ever grateful for your support!

\-- Madison, Deputy Finance Director

[**DONATE**](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/6489081f/7f51f7bc/4bd79b95/4ef0a406/1348715189/VEsHBA/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjUxNSJ9/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-lessthan1yr?refcode=email_20191115.2nd__515__&amount=10&recurring=true")

We've been getting $3, $5, $10 from teachers, social workers, delivery drivers – you name it. It's clearly resonating with people; I'm convinced that the more folks see this video, the more we can grow this team. That's why we have plans to make sure as many people as possible can watch this video. **However, we need your help to make that happen.[_Will you make a $5 gift today to help us share this ad far and wide to all corners of our community?_](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/mps2/c/CQE/ni0YAA/t.2wq/Vyqke6A5RbaMEQow4SIkKg/h2/hhRpZZW1RfrqdNP9De00vQRlUIk-2BKhU3wA9r6CKglNJGRhaVukZaMlZvGh566ODI7wsnXHs-2Fumvhip5-2FSclhMlAyNXHr5RT8-2BKAhzwvyTL2bNOVojjAuV0AVWa9hBEPSUU5zT3G2vbkGOWA7s-2BPj2VreZ6uu4GHCBi40RCx27Du41ld8iJbGixnpynRrCCQlxr4JpBwTyzfeWz1H1s3MHb4K8-2B-2BG3yAccL7Ab25qvc6J1brlNobdo909oas2tTE8u6L9a5Oy5gTK6sjlzunUIeVbmy66XkauEsgGJ0oCS06OB1GK9I-2BWErx-2FS-2F-2FwoVCF/i79i)** [Give $5 »](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/mps2/c/CQE/ni0YAA/t.2wq/Vyqke6A5RbaMEQow4SIkKg/h3/hhRpZZW1RfrqdNP9De00vQRlUIk-2BKhU3wA9r6CKglNJGRhaVukZaMlZvGh566ODI7wsnXHs-2Fumvhip5-2FSclhMlAyNXHr5RT8-2BKAhzwvyTL1jHs4MPquSiQcKh3R5waRV7pvtstWefJS8oaO6ODPmCZB6IGQQhe2pxKHTyLGZFbukD4lGUB6eWr77JpDAe5KzeAuAFQe4JbdmsjKaXHT9-2FwPCSdfO8ZMWE7-2B19lg7LzVgSyHPJMJsDPH376tR38FMS-2Fgas332DBSM8DYlpnYqlXHGyCg7XPpbYUZpH4MNSeWMg1PNr6Hy-2FRZFYmCmq9gk/zctG) I'm glad I can share how growing up as the child of a single mother, hearing stories from my grandparents about the racism they experienced in the Jim Crow south, informed my worldview and impressed upon me the importance of fighting tooth and nail for what's right. clean_body: We have plans to make sure as many people as possible can watch this video. However, we need your help to make that happen. | | | Friend, Have you watched my new video? It's only been out for one day and we've already received a huge response. We've been getting $3, $5, $10 from teachers, social workers, delivery drivers – you name it. It's clearly resonating with people; I'm convinced that the more folks see this video, the more we can grow this team. That's why we have plans to make sure as many people as possible can watch this video. However, we need your help to make that happen. I'm glad I can share how growing up as the child of a single mother, hearing stories from my grandparents about the racism they experienced in the Jim Crow south, informed my worldview and impressed upon me the importance of fighting tooth and nail for what's right. I want to share that story and message with everyone – but my team needs your help to put our media plan into action. Remember, this campaign is grassroots-funded and people-powered; we rely on generous supporters like you giving what you can. Thanks! Donate any amount to be automatically entered for a chance to win a trip to meet me at the December Democratic debate in Los Angeles: | | | | My campaign for president is built on listening to the people and organizing at the grassroots. I can’t wait to share this experience with the winner and their guest. I hope to see you on the trail, Tom P.S. name: Ed Markey
subject: Republicans blocked a vote on gun reforms in the middle of another mass shooting
disclaimer_text: Paid for by The Markey Committee
body:
| |
---
| Team,

Yesterday, at the exact moment Democrats called for a vote on the universal gun background checks bill passed by the House, news broke of another mass shooting--this time at a California high school.

And then, Republicans blocked the vote.

We cannot continue to live with the bloodshed and death of mass shootings.

[_**I am calling on Senate Majority Leader Mitch McConnell to stop blocking gun safety legislation. Join me and call for action now by signing our petition.**_](https://ma.edmarkey.com/page/m/10c1df74/693b8b0a/43f8fb0b/72de79b8/1091260961/VEsH/p/eyJKU1ZGYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVkdhWEp6ZEc1aGJXVWxKUT09IjoiIiwiSlNWTVlYTjBibUZ0WlNVbCI6IiIsIkpTVmFhWEFsSlE9PSI6IjE4MzI2In0%3D/?g=-NfBFVNw52hcsCx35ezxeoA "https://ma.edmarkey.com/page/s/demand-action-to-end-gun-violence?source=EM-111519_1&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&zip=18326")

**[SIGN THE PETITION](https://ma.edmarkey.com/page/m/10c1df74/693b8b0a/43f8fb0b/72de79b8/1091260961/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZGYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVkdhWEp6ZEc1aGJXVWxKUT09IjoiIiwiSlNWTVlYTjBibUZ0WlNVbCI6IiIsIkpTVmFhWEFsSlE9PSI6IjE4MzI2In0%3D/?g=-NfBFVNw52hcsCx35ezxeoA "https://ma.edmarkey.com/page/s/demand-action-to-end-gun-violence?source=EM-111519_1&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&zip=18326")**
Mitch McConnell and Senate Republicans have blocked all gun reform legislation while taking millions of dollars in campaign donations from the NRA.

The majority of Americans support commonsense solutions to end gun violence. The only thing standing in our way are leaders who are in the pockets of gun manufacturers.

**[SIGN THE PETITION](https://ma.edmarkey.com/page/m/10c1df74/693b8b0a/43f8fb0b/72de79b8/1091260961/VEsF/p/eyJKU1ZGYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVkdhWEp6ZEc1aGJXVWxKUT09IjoiIiwiSlNWTVlYTjBibUZ0WlNVbCI6IiIsIkpTVmFhWEFsSlE9PSI6IjE4MzI2In0%3D/?g=-NfBFVNw52hcsCx35ezxeoA "https://ma.edmarkey.com/page/s/demand-action-to-end-gun-violence?source=EM-111519_1&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&zip=18326")**
In Massachusetts, we took matters into our own hands.

We identified the problems of gun violence, put our communities and public safety officers first, and passed gun reform laws.

We now have one of the lowest levels of gun deaths in the country. This is not a coincidence.

We need reforms at the national level, and Mitch McConnell must stop blocking commonsense solutions on behalf of the NRA.

[_**If you agree, sign my petition and call on Senate Majority Leader Mitch McConnell to allow a vote on commonsense gun safety legislation now.**_](https://ma.edmarkey.com/page/m/10c1df74/693b8b0a/43f8fb0b/72de79b8/1091260961/VEsC/p/eyJKU1ZGYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVkdhWEp6ZEc1aGJXVWxKUT09IjoiIiwiSlNWTVlYTjBibUZ0WlNVbCI6IiIsIkpTVmFhWEFsSlE9PSI6IjE4MzI2In0%3D/?g=-NfBFVNw52hcsCx35ezxeoA "https://ma.edmarkey.com/page/s/demand-action-to-end-gun-violence?source=EM-111519_1&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&zip=18326")

**[SIGN THE PETITION](https://ma.edmarkey.com/page/m/10c1df74/693b8b0a/43f8fb0b/72de79b8/1091260961/VEsD/p/eyJKU1ZGYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVkdhWEp6ZEc1aGJXVWxKUT09IjoiIiwiSlNWTVlYTjBibUZ0WlNVbCI6IiIsIkpTVmFhWEFsSlE9PSI6IjE4MzI2In0%3D/?g=-NfBFVNw52hcsCx35ezxeoA "https://ma.edmarkey.com/page/s/demand-action-to-end-gun-violence?source=EM-111519_1&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&zip=18326")**
Thanks for standing with me,

Ed

| Friends,

In a moment, I'm going to ask you to chip in to my campaign. **But first I want to explain why it 's so important that you're a part of this team:**

There are three months until the first ballot is cast, and the race is constantly in flux.

This will be a tough fight, but as the only candidate running who has won two national races in a purple swing state, I'm not afraid of a challenge.

[I owe those victories to my dedicated base of grassroots supporters like you.](https://secure.michaelbennet.com/page/m/35cbae26/134673f2/987f61f/6997d5e7/3683641678/VEsH/?g=GUSlGlH8x8Vcy9-bgCeB4mA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/bfa-november?refcode=EM_FR_B2_111519_AC_ND&recurring=auto&amount=5&amounts=10,35,50,100,250,500,1000")

Now we've set a goal of raising **$15,OOO by midnight tonight.** It's a big goal, but hitting it will allow us to run ads, expand our field operations, and keep knocking doors.

[We're only $5,740 short. Friend, will you to make your first donation to close the gap and keep this campaign going strong? >>](https://secure.michaelbennet.com/page/m/35cbae26/134673f2/987f61f/6997d5e7/3683641678/VEsE/?g=GUSlGlH8x8Vcy9-bgCeB4mA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/bfa-november?refcode=EM_FR_B2_111519_AC_ND&recurring=auto&amount=5&amounts=10,35,50,100,250,500,1000")

name: Elizabeth Warren
subject: Add your name: Our plan to transition to Medicare for All
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Warren for President
body:
But every serious proposal for Medicare for All contemplates a significant transition period. And that's why, today, I'm announcing my plan to expand public health care coverage, reduce costs, and... | | | [](https://my.elizabethwarren.com/page/m/285289ea/45c30650/10512c6ce/66f42565/2324746592/VEsH/p/eyJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVm1hWEp6ZEc1aGJXVWxKUT09IjoiIiwiSlNWc1lYTjBibUZ0WlNVbCI6IiIsIkpTVjZhWEFsSlE9PSI6IjE4MzI2In0%3D/?g=4qwscq_HJ6FcsC0VbCsFfMA "https://elizabethwarren.com?source=em-header&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&zip=18326")
---
I've already laid out how we can pay for Medicare for All without raising any middle-class taxes -- and while putting $11 trillion in the pockets of American families.

But every serious proposal for Medicare for All contemplates a significant transition period. And that's why, today, I'm announcing my plan to expand public health care coverage, reduce costs, and improve the quality of care for every family in America.

My plan will be completed in my first term. It includes dramatic actions to lower drug prices, a Medicare for All option available to everyone that is more generous than any plan proposed by any other presidential candidate, critical health system reforms to save money and save lives, and a full transition to Medicare for All.

We know every step in the coming fight to improve American health care -- like every other fight to improve American health care -- will be opposed by those powerful industries who profit from our broken system.

But I'll fight my heart out at each step of this process, for one simple reason: **I spent a lifetime learning about families going broke, including from the high cost of health care. When I'm president of the United States, I'm going to do everything in my power to make sure that never happens to another person again.**

[**I'm not afraid to fight, and I know how to win. It starts with our grassroots movement. Add your name if you support our plan to get to Medicare for All. I'll always be deeply grateful to fight by your side.**](https://my.elizabethwarren.com/page/m/285289ea/45c30650/10512c6ce/66f42564/2324746592/VEsF/p/eyJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVm1hWEp6ZEc1aGJXVWxKUT09IjoiIiwiSlNWc1lYTjBibUZ0WlNVbCI6IiIsIkpTVjZhWEFsSlE9PSI6IjE4MzI2IiwiZTNzZ2NtVm1ZMjlrWlNCOWZRPT0iOiJFTUw2NVBfUkxUX000QV9FXzIwMTkxMTE1X1YxUzFfUCJ9/?g=4qwscq_HJ6FcsC0VbCsFfMA "https://my.elizabethwarren.com/page/s/ew-m4a?source=EML65P_RLT_M4A_E_20191115_V1S1_P&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&zip=18326")

**In my first 100 days, I'll...**

-> **Pursue comprehensive anti-corruption reforms to rein in health insurers and drug companies:** If the next president has any intention of winning any health care fight, they must start by reforming Washington. By closing the revolving door, taxing excessive lobbying, ending lobbyist bribery, and more, we will keep powerful special interests from blocking Medicare for All.

-> **Use the tools of the presidency to immediately start improving health coverage and lowering costs:** I'll reverse Donald Trump's sabotage of the Affordable Care Act, protect people with pre-existing conditions, take on the big pharmaceutical companies to lower costs of key drugs for millions of Americans, and improve the Affordable Care Act, Medicare, and Medicaid.

-> **Fight for a true Medicare for All option that's immediately free for tens of millions:** I'll use the same process Mitch McConnell used to try to kill the Affordable Care Act and bypass the filibuster. We will give every American over the age of 50 the choice to enter an improved Medicare program. And we will give every person in America the choice to get coverage through a true Medicare for All option. Coverage under the new Medicare for All option will be immediately free for children under the age of 18 and for families making at or below 200% of the federal poverty level (about $51,000 for a family of four).

Look: There are many proposals out there that claim to be a "public option" -- but most of them create the illusion of choice, when in reality they offer tens of millions of Americans the decision between unaffordable private insurance and unaffordable public insurance. A choice between two bad options isn't a choice at all.

My approach is different. I have identified trillions in revenue to finance a fully functioning Medicare for All system -- without raising taxes on the middle class by one penny -- I can also fund a true Medicare for All option.

By the end of my first 100 days, we will have opened the door for tens of millions of Americans to get high-quality Medicare for All coverage at little or no cost. But I won't stop there. Throughout my first term, I'll also fight for additional health system reforms to save money and save lives -- including a boost of $100 billion in guaranteed, mandatory spending for new NIH research.

**Then, by my third year in office, I'll fight to pass legislation that would complete the transition to full Medicare for All by the end of my first term.** By then, the American people will know what it's like to have the full benefits of a true Medicare for All option, and they'll know how it stacks up against high-priced care that requires them to fight tooth and nail against their insurance company. By integrating every American into the new program, the American people would save trillions of dollars on health costs. The choice will be clear.

**And at each step of my plan, millions more Americans will pay lower costs for care. Millions more Americans will see the quality of their current health coverage improve. And millions more Americans will have the choice to ditch their private insurance and enter a high-quality public plan.**

**But we won't get it done unless we fight side by side.** Health insurance and drug companies are profiting off of people's pain right now, and they don't want big, structural change -- but the American people need it.

[**Add your name to demand Medicare for All, and be in this fight all the way.**](https://my.elizabethwarren.com/page/m/285289ea/45c30650/10512c6ce/66f42564/2324746592/VEsC/p/eyJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVm1hWEp6ZEc1aGJXVWxKUT09IjoiIiwiSlNWc1lYTjBibUZ0WlNVbCI6IiIsIkpTVjZhWEFsSlE9PSI6IjE4MzI2IiwiZTNzZ2NtVm1ZMjlrWlNCOWZRPT0iOiJFTUw2NVBfUkxUX000QV9FXzIwMTkxMTE1X1YxUzFfUCJ9/?g=4qwscq_HJ6FcsC0VbCsFfMA "https://my.elizabethwarren.com/page/s/ew-m4a?source=EML65P_RLT_M4A_E_20191115_V1S1_P&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&zip=18326")

Thanks for being a part of this,

Elizabeth

| [ **ADD YOUR NAME**](https://my.elizabethwarren.com/page/m/285289ea/45c30650/10512c6ce/66f42564/2324746592/VEsD/p/eyJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVm1hWEp6ZEc1aGJXVWxKUT09IjoiIiwiSlNWc1lYTjBibUZ0WlNVbCI6IiIsIkpTVjZhWEFsSlE9PSI6IjE4MzI2IiwiZTNzZ2NtVm1ZMjlrWlNCOWZRPT0iOiJFTUw2NVBfUkxUX000QV9FXzIwMTkxMTE1X1YxUzFfUCJ9/?g=4qwscq_HJ6FcsC0VbCsFfMA "https://my.elizabethwarren.com/page/s/ew-m4a?source=EML65P_RLT_M4A_E_20191115_V1S1_P&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&zip=18326")

---
| | | [ ](https://my.elizabethwarren.com/page/m/285289ea/45c30650/10512c6ce/66f42566/2324746592/VEsB/?g=4qwscq_HJ6FcsC0VbCsFfMA "https://www.facebook.com/ElizabethWarren/") | [ ](https://my.elizabethwarren.com/page/m/285289ea/45c30650/10512c6ce/66f42569/2324746592/VEsO/?g=4qwscq_HJ6FcsC0VbCsFfMA "https://twitter.com/ewarren") | [ ](https://my.elizabethwarren.com/page/m/285289ea/45c30650/10512c6ce/66f42568/2324746592/VEsP/?g=4qwscq_HJ6FcsC0VbCsFfMA "https://www.instagram.com/elizabethwarren/") | [ ](https://my.elizabethwarren.com/page/m/285289ea/45c30650/10512c6ce/66f4256b/2324746592/VEsHBQ/?g=4qwscq_HJ6FcsC0VbCsFfMA "https://www.youtube.com/channel/UCrj-0FxK19tgUR2EbHkBBGg/videos") | [ ](https://my.elizabethwarren.com/page/m/285289ea/45c30650/10512c6ce/66f4256a/2324746592/VEsHBA/?g=4qwscq_HJ6FcsC0VbCsFfMA "https://www.flickr.com/photos/elizabethwarren") | [ ](https://my.elizabethwarren.com/page/m/285289ea/45c30650/10512c6ce/66f4256d/2324746592/VEsHBw/?g=4qwscq_HJ6FcsC0VbCsFfMA "https://medium.com/@teamwarren")

name: When Democrats Turn Out
subject: Offshore drilling threatens our coast
disclaimer_text: Paid for by When Democrats Turn Out PAC
body:
|
---

| | Peter, While Democrats are focused on impeachment and voting Trump out in 2020, he's using every possible moment to cause as much damage as possible \-- especially with his environmental policies. Trump has gutted emissions standards, expanded logging and mining, and now, he wants to expand offshore drilling into the Atlantic. Expanding offshore drilling would be devastating to our environment and coastal economies, and the GOP knows it, but all they care about are corporate donations. They may not care about the future of our planet or the health of our children, but America does. Joe Cunningham, a Democrat, flipped an R+10 district in South Carolina in 2018 on a platform opposing offshore drilling with support from pro-environment Republicans. If everyone raises their voices and speaks out, it can cause real change. [**We need everyone who cares to tell the Trump administration that we will not let our shores, beaches, and town be polluted by oil just so they can get an extra dime in their pockets. If you agree, you 've got to make your voice heard today -- you can make a difference.**](https://turnoutpac.bsd.net/page/m/78bcdc36/6e9863e8/1678be79/1db09097/571436811/VEsH/?g=mj_BT60LBwxdW4nnt4whVXA "https://www.signherenow.org/petition/atlantic-offshore-drilling/wdtop/") Thank you, The WDTO Team [ADD YOUR NAME](https://turnoutpac.bsd.net/page/m/78bcdc36/6e9863e8/1678be79/1db09097/571436811/VEsE/?g=mj_BT60LBwxdW4nnt4whVXA "https://www.signherenow.org/petition/atlantic-offshore-drilling/wdtop/")

name: =?utf-8?Q?Indiana=20Republican=20Party?=
subject: Keeping Hoosiers Safe
body:
Across the state, Indiana’s state troopers are there for us. Along with all of Indiana’s law enforcement officers, they keep Hoosiers safe, while...

View this email in your browser (https://mailchi.mp/indiana/keeping-hoosiers-safe?e=1acd9bb3d6)

Keeping Hoosiers Safe

Across the state, Indiana’s state troopers are there for us. They keep Hoosiers safe by risking their own safety each and every day. Of course, you know that Governor Eric Holcomb is proud to stand as a supporter of Indiana’s law enforcement community. Over the last three years (and, really, over his entire career), he’s actively supported our law enforcement, and he has worked to deliver for them—like they deliver for us—during each legislative session.

And earlier this week, our state troopers stood with Governor Holcomb. In case you missed it, he earned the endorsement of the Indiana State Police Alliance to continue to serving Hoosiers for another four years! The Alliance is comprised of more than 2,000 active and retired state troopers from each of Indiana’s 92 counties. They decided to endorse our governor because he doesn’t just support our state troopers – he delivers and is Putting People First.

“Indiana’s thin blue line is made up of selfless women and men who drop everything and spring into action in service of someone else – no matter what danger stands in their way,” said Governor Holcomb. “Whenever duty calls, Indiana’s law enforcement officers answer and protect all of us. As Hoosiers, we proudly stand with them and I couldn’t be more honored to have their support.”

I’m thankful for our law enforcement officers, and I’m proud that Governor Holcomb has earned their support!

-Kyle Hupfer
Governor Holcomb's Week That Was

Governor Holcomb Earns Endorsement of the Indiana State Police Alliance

Breaking News! Governor Holcomb has earned the endorsement of the Indiana State Police Alliance for his 2020 re-election bid.

Governor Holcomb was joined by Cory Martin, executive director of the Indiana State Police Alliance, where Martin announced the organizations endorsement. This quote from Martin says it best, "It is very apparent that through countless interactions, Governor Holcomb not only supports our members but truly cares about them as one Hoosier to another". During each legislative session, Governor Holcomb has worked to serve the brave law enforcement officers who keep Hoosiers safe throughout the state.

This is another huge step in Governor Holcomb's campaign to keep on Putting People First!
http://indiana.gop/congressofcounties?mc_cid=a9cdcdc611&mc_eid=[UNIQID]
Congress of Counties Registration Now Open!

subject: The dirty trick dial is up to 11

body:
| [](https://secure.jeffmerkley.com/page/m/16c2cb8f/6cd27893/52125121/15879354/2497679706/VEsH/?g=fjbuEq_HJ6FcsCg1a40jRRA "http://www.jeffmerkley.com")
---

| | Things are pretty intense right now in Washington D.C. Democrats have to be constantly on our guard -- because Republicans and their dark-money allies are turning the dirty trick dial up to 11. With the president facing impeachment hearings, with Republicans trying to turn it all into a circus, and with the public in an uproar over the shameful policies coming out of the White House and their allies in Congress, the Republican plan is clear: spend hundreds of millions of dollars in Senate races across America to try to stop us from taking back the majority. [**I've set a goal of raising $87,000 from grassroots donors by the end of November to fight back. We're just past halfway there. Donate $3 and let's get America back on track.**](https://secure.jeffmerkley.com/page/m/16c2cb8f/6cd27893/52125121/15879355/2497679706/VEsE/p/eyJlM3RoYzJ0OWZRPT0iOiIzIiwiZTN0aFltRnRkRjl2Ym1WOWZRPT0iOiI1IiwiZTN0aFltRnRkRjkwZDI5OWZRPT0iOiIxNSIsImUzdGhZbUZ0ZEY5MGFISmxaWDE5IjoiMjUiLCJlM3RoWW1GdGRGOW1iM1Z5ZlgwPSI6IjUwIiwiZTN0aFltRnRkRjltYVhabGZYMD0iOiIxMDAifQ%3D%3D/?g=fjbuEq_HJ6FcsCg1a40jRRA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/stand-with-jeff-merkley?refcode=2019-11-15-eom&recurring=1&amount=3&amounts=5,15,25,50,100") Donald Trump and his team want to put Oregon on the map in 2020. name: info@walzforgovernor.org
subject: Fwd: re: Tonight.
disclaimer_text: paid for by Tim Walz for Governor
body:
| Hi there, Did you see the Governor's note from earlier today? Our mid-quarter deadline is just hours away at midnight and we still need to raise $1,258 to hit our goal. In less than two months, our 2019 fundraising numbers will be made public for the first time. [](https://act.myngp.com/el/rlgHdWgw_ewo8h4-Jxa2EFPTvlcwpOjASQcmfIFJnWA=/Q7TTba7PUvibQdkNM1ZdfXWJNQIXGYBJ5gOKde-2oV0=?refcode=header&amount=25)
---
Hi there,
Did you see the Governor's note from earlier today? Our mid-quarter deadline is just hours away at midnight and we still need to raise $1,258 to hit our goal.
**In less than two months, our 2019 fundraising numbers will be made public for _the first time_.** We need to make sure they send an unmistakable message about the strength of our campaign for One Minnesota.
[**Please, rush a contribution that works for you by MIDNIGHT so we can stay on track to finish the year strong and continue our important work to take back the Minnesota Senate.**](https://act.myngp.com/el/rlgHdWgw_ewo8h4-Jxa2EFPTvlcwpOjASQcmfIFJnWA=/Q7TTba7PUvibQdkNM1ZdfXWJNQIXGYBJ5gOKde-2oV0=?refcode=body&amount=25)
Thank you,
Team Walz-Flanagan
\-------- Forwarded message --------
From: Tim Walz
My friend,
President Trump is going to do everything he can to flip Minnesota red next year. The Minnesota Senate Republicans are lining up to defend him at all costs because they want to benefit from the tens of millions of dollars his campaign plans to pour into our state.
They defend him as his failed trade war continues to devastate Minnesota farmers. They defend him as his absurd $1.5 trillion tax giveaway to billionaires and ultra-wealthy corporations explodes the national deficit. They defend him as his administration tries to gut coverage for preexisting conditions 2.3 million Minnesotans rely on.
**They even defended him when he was in town last month spreading his divisive message across our state and unleashing attacks directly on our fellow Minnesotans.**
We deserve a Minnesota Senate majority that will put Minnesotans first, not one that tries to pit us against each other for their own political gain. That's why we're doing everything we can to take it back by electing allies who will help us rise above fear and division, and fight for a brighter future for our state.
**Our Q4 mid-quarter deadline is at midnight and we still need to raise just over $3,200 to hit our budget target so we can get the job done.[Can I count on you to make a contribution of $5, $10, $25 or more to help us finish strong before we run out of time?](https://act.myngp.com/el/rlgHdWgw_ewo8h4-Jxa2EFPTvlcwpOjASQcmfIFJnWA=/Q7TTba7PUvibQdkNM1ZdfXWJNQIXGYBJ5gOKde-2oV0=?refcode=body&amount=25)**
Our 2019 fundraising totals will be made public for the first time shortly after the New Year.
**This is one of the biggest opportunities we 'll have to prove that our campaign for One Minnesota is stronger than ever. Let's make the most of it.**
[**Please, help us make up the difference and hit our goal by midnight. Make a contribution that works for you today.**](https://act.myngp.com/el/rlgHdWgw_ewo8h4-Jxa2EFPTvlcwpOjASQcmfIFJnWA=/Q7TTba7PUvibQdkNM1ZdfXWJNQIXGYBJ5gOKde-2oV0=?refcode=body&amount=25)
_If you 've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_
******[Express Donate: $25](https://act.myngp.com/el/rlgHdWgw_ewo8h4-Jxa2EFPTvlcwpOjASQcmfIFJnWA=/Q7TTba7PUvibQdkNM1ZdfXWJNQIXGYBJ5gOKde-2oV0=?express_lane=true&amount=25&refcode=_25-p)******
******[Express Donate: $50](https://act.myngp.com/el/rlgHdWgw_ewo8h4-Jxa2EFPTvlcwpOjASQcmfIFJnWA=/Q7TTba7PUvibQdkNM1ZdfXWJNQIXGYBJ5gOKde-2oV0=?express_lane=true&amount=50&refcode=_50-p)******
******[Express Donate: $100](https://act.myngp.com/el/rlgHdWgw_ewo8h4-Jxa2EFPTvlcwpOjASQcmfIFJnWA=/Q7TTba7PUvibQdkNM1ZdfXWJNQIXGYBJ5gOKde-2oV0=?express_lane=true&amount=100&refcode=_100-p)******
******[Express Donate: $250](https://act.myngp.com/el/rlgHdWgw_ewo8h4-Jxa2EFPTvlcwpOjASQcmfIFJnWA=/Q7TTba7PUvibQdkNM1ZdfXWJNQIXGYBJ5gOKde-2oV0=?express_lane=true&amount=250&refcode=_250-p)******
******[Or, donate another amount](https://act.myngp.com/el/rlgHdWgw_ewo8h4-Jxa2EFPTvlcwpOjASQcmfIFJnWA=/Q7TTba7PUvibQdkNM1ZdfXWJNQIXGYBJ5gOKde-2oV0=?refcode=_other-p)******
Thank you for everything you do for this campaign and the State of Minnesota.
I'm grateful,
Tim Walz
| **********[**DONATE**](https://act.myngp.com/el/rlgHdWgw_ewo8h4-Jxa2EFPTvlcwpOjASQcmfIFJnWA=/Q7TTba7PUvibQdkNM1ZdfXWJNQIXGYBJ5gOKde-2oV0=?refcode=button-p&amount=25)**********

** **

|

| Prepared and paid for by Tim Walz for Governor
---

If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please [unsubscribe](https://act.myngp.com/el/rlgHdWgw_ewo8h4-Jxa2EFPTvlcwpOjASQcmfIFJnWA=/naRpa4MWRg3vPTGiz5pIOnKL9cA6th6YWwlD_X17_ng=). Tim Walz for Governor

St. Paul MN 55104 United States

name: SaraGideon.com

body:
Midnight.
# [](https://gideon.bsd.net/page/m/65802f21/4bef7a87/6bc803e8/287fc903/986961176/VEsH/?g=siAzLVH8x8VdU6OjQM8XC0A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sg-email-template?refcode=em_header")

**Tonight at midnight, we close the books on our Emergency 48-hour Deadline. We set a goal of raising $100,000 to get us back on track to hit our fundraising goal this quarter and announce a really great number when our FEC report goes public.**
[**Can you make a $3 contribution before our emergency fundraising drive comes to a close in just a few hours?**](https://gideon.bsd.net/page/m/65802f21/4bef7a87/6bc803e8/287fc902/986961176/VEsE/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0xOTExMTUtMi1mdWxsIn0%3D/?g=siAzLVH8x8VdU6OjQM8XC0A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sg-48-hrs-nov?refcode=em191115-2-full")
**_Emergency Fundraising Drive_**
Name: Gideon Supporter
Supporter ID: 222638
Donated to drive: No, not yet!
**Suggested Contribution: [**$3**](https://gideon.bsd.net/page/m/65802f21/4bef7a87/6bc803e8/287fc902/986961176/VEsF/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0xOTExMTUtMi1mdWxsIn0%3D/?g=siAzLVH8x8VdU6OjQM8XC0A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sg-48-hrs-nov?refcode=em191115-2-full")**

I 've built this movement through the support of grassroots donors like you, alone, because you are who should decide this election. Will you take a stand with me and rush $5? >>_**](https://action.julianforthefuture.%3D/?g=5-wKdTjfd5lcsCTt4S4B-7A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/julian-em?refcode=20191115_em_fr_b2_castro_all&recurring=auto&amount=5&amounts=25,50,100,250") I know from experience the system is not set up for us equally. name: Claudia Tenney
subject: Anthony Brindisi’s at it again...
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Claudia for Congress |
body:
While Democrats in Congress are continuing this impeachment media circus, Anthony Brindisi is trying to distract you from his disappointing track... | |
---
[ ](http://links.claudiaforcongress.com/u/click?_t=e8d915629893476cb837806f005d02de&_m=1fcb43a9601049b2b82a6515bae9479d&_e=nTQ_C8cIPv7Adpqb43V2i3GGJh6jsyze2bOc293gxc2n5GTAjzYKXkqfMr8ctj8R_UJIughXypJecKp2vNa5ms46mJDUSpFDoGbhLrWO0DF9v2V9zpitfMcV8MSny8T-WOa4bzUZ5Nqz7TGG-B7bXxbSOkopde-QnbB5Ll7Vf_NBYz1wA85bEZ-utPYMQrl2CiiIlXG2doOOtETAcXpYGOwE1nr2Bu5NR_9ZlctiLY8VQbdCXVrFW8AEVkYzxt7zjwdf4C5i7ZfDUiZy0XG4m4qSmpSSUYeCa7UPLvDL6MD9y6a5dPoWdBtCEM5FPWdxcdU5vHcMHPweGoJaxApYs1EOyuVhjnGbliRr2PNnyHXHeeyqujdmkYGsPa7MrpI0Ub9i4EFWUXuEe_YtRzxLkKKzp8uVA_gOHDvOevc06Y4iUF436OUkoddLDMJ1rE2L8Y5mVkXGeDNseIJd7jr3Bg%3D%3D)
|
---
Peter, Anthony Brindisi is at it again. He claims to be fighting to lower your cable bill by taking on Spectrum, but he’s just using the issue to distract you from his record of accomplishing NOTHING in Congress.

Democrats are continuing their baseless witch hunt against President Trump (which Anthony voted for) instead of working for the American people.

I think it’s time that Anthony gets back to work for us. If you agree, sign our petition and tell him to get back to work!
[ **TELL ANTHONY: GET BACK TO WORK!** ](http://links.claudiaforcongress.com/u/click?_t=e8d915629893476cb837806f005d02de&_m=1fcb43a9601049b2b82a6515bae9479d&_e=nTQ_C8cIPv7Adpqb43V2i3GGJh6jsyze2bOc293gxc2n5GTAjzYKXkqfMr8ctj8R_UJIughXypJecKp2vNa5ms46mJDUSpFDoGbhLrWO0DF9v2V9zpitfMcV8MSny8T-WOa4bzUZ5Nqz7TGG-B7bXxbSOkopde-QnbB5Ll7Vf_NBYz1wA85bEZ-utPYMQrl2CiiIlXG2doOOtETAcXpYGOwE1nr2Bu5NR_9ZlctiLY_2B-Gz8cieLkrRDrF7bpV_aUR1Elcjl5xd2OvX8e0TKo0YijwIC5XsBrr9v3e9NtyhrNFUYjHk50BrsZgxKthRk8wtjKgNFkGOyHZX99VfllZ5Tz1wfuz_Ag19OMoVFi7YsvFc-_GoauU9U_XGWfnuPvw5_rdcWFh9yhz9k2telF3IugXO0chdnDnhyjKkOEKbvG6_MPefa_j6S8BUjcN68D0igyfBTWJ5nwCcNJt6jQ%3D%3D)
**While Anthony Brindisi says he’s working to lower your cable bill, he actually joined with Andrew Cuomo in the New York State Assembly to allow Spectrum Cable to have a monopoly over our area and drive up your cable bill.**

Anthony Brindisi is busy in Washington, carrying on this impeachment media circus while your cable, electricity and healthcare costs continue to skyrocket.

Peter, Anthony and the do-nothing Democrats are more interested in the distraction of impeachment than delivering real results for our community. Enough is enough.
[ **TELL ANTHONY: GET BACK TO WORK!** ](http://links.claudiaforcongress.com/u/click?_t=e8d915629893476cb837806f005d02de&_m=1fcb43a9601049b2b82a6515bae9479d&_e=nTQ_C8cIPv7Adpqb43V2i3GGJh6jsyze2bOc293gxc2n5GTAjzYKXkqfMr8ctj8R_UJIughXypJecKp2vNa5ms46mJDUSpFDoGbhLrWO0DF9v2V9zpitfMcV8MSny8T-WOa4bzUZ5Nqz7TGG-B7bXxbSOkopde-QnbB5Ll7Vf_NBYz1wA85bEZ-utPYMQrl2CiiIlXG2doOOtETAcXpYGOwE1nr2Bu5NR_9ZlctiLY9egWLlJutq6O5DTbdTkBDVF-gElp7jd1eUdXoVPti86KNnoq1I0t3VM44sHjuldMXhDXY1O_Gb8WLl9DQ8woBlN3DqSShwqvrr4LJWBZCEIpAi-efRT_Zl_NRSZvk3Qlz7cw9VQCswKW9PWyoxAwlCwUF05zMmnwzp3XcBxy9lvXstiHsCIildMhkGLcKYaD_peeI80p34PJJKRWUOGT2HZOb0yrm-APkRU5VvyzmekA%3D%3D)
We need someone in Congress who’s working for us, not Washington liberals and out-of-state donors. **[Tell Anthony Brindisi to get back to work.>>>](http://links.claudiaforcongress.com/u/click?_t=e8d915629893476cb837806f005d02de&_m=1fcb43a9601049b2b82a6515bae9479d&_e=nTQ_C8cIPv7Adpqb43V2i3GGJh6jsyze2bOc293gxc2n5GTAjzYKXkqfMr8ctj8R_UJIughXypJecKp2vNa5ms46mJDUSpFDoGbhLrWO0DF9v2V9zpitfMcV8MSny8T-WOa4bzUZ5Nqz7TGG-B7bXxbSOkopde-QnbB5Ll7Vf_NBYz1wA85bEZ-utPYMQrl2CiiIlXG2doOOtETAcXpYGOwE1nr2Bu5NR_9ZlctiLY-He__CGZ-mVR0Kt_2eWx7yWAvO6JlyAoX1jG1V-IwAALwf1NPC1g1rTs31o21YhBaIl3mgGeCX1O4k34QCIg034MxD6V5EbUdIB8uOQekqOqfyNcK-CgRzAB8ZqPMPWg3fLTzYWy1-74wUzAXVP-TUJnHxF_0esfL9viXXMbpGG497yojo98fXzrbJhD0rQTjt7_eAl14zSVulNjl3V2odQqhCPQ0MqYRN_SNS96pzEw%3D%3D)**

Thanks for your support,

Claudia Tenney

name: =?utf-8?Q?Hirsh=20Singh?=
subject: Can you believe what we're seeing?
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY SINGH FOR SENATE
body:
These impeachment hearings, what a joke, right? |
---
| | [ ](https://hirshsingh.us15.list-manage.com/track/click?u=978b8670b44783121d15ac87e&id=27ff348dfd&e=3e017fab0f)
---
|
---
| Friend,

Our elected officials are supposed to represent us. They're supposed to do what's best for their constituents. **_That is the essence of their jobs._**

So why is it for the last few months, the Do Nothing Democrats have accomplished nothing beyond constantly whining about President Trump?

When I first entered this race, I was determined to fight for Americans and stop the hypocrisy pushed by leftists like Cory Booker. **Seeing our President come under such furious attack has only steeled my resolve.**

How badly does this country need a change of pace? How much longer should we tolerate Democrats abusing their power and slandering President Trump?

**With your support, I will stand _strong_ in the U.S. Senate. _I will stand strong for President Trump._**

That's why I'm writing to you today, Friend. This is a battle that cannot be fought alone; your support is absolutely necessary.

**Will you contribute to our campaign in support of President Trump?**

name: Nikki (personal)
subject: one last email
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Nikki Foster for Congress
body:
---
| | I wouldn't be reaching out on a Friday afternoon unless it was really important. National Republicans AND my Republican opponent Steve Chabot are attacking me from both sides. I've been called a "socialist loser," "far-left," and "radical." name: =?utf-8?Q?Renee=20Unterman?=
subject: Campaign Newsletter, 11/15/19
body:
| |
---
| | |
---
|
Greetings from the campaign trail!

This week we honored the courageous individuals, and their families, who have made sacrifices in uniform so that Americans may enjoy our liberties. I joined my friends in Sugar Hill for a Veterans Day celebration and was deeply moved by the dedication of the beautiful new monument to remember and honor those who served in the Armed Forces.
---
|
---
| Later, I visited with my good friend, Maron Buice. Maron received a medal from the community in recognition of his courageous service to our country during WWII.
---
|
---
| On Wednesday, I had the privilege of hosting Gwinnett Senior Leadership at the State Capitol. We discussed many of the issues that affect Gwinnett County, our region and the state as a whole. I am thankful for their leadership in our community!
---
|
---
| Finally, I joined Loganville residents at a ceremony for Mayor Rey Martinez to officially proclaim Loganville a Purple Heart City! As a former Mayor of Loganville, I was so pleased by this initiative to recognize the sacrifices made by the brave men and women in uniform.
---
|
---
| Our grassroots campaign relies on the support of Georgians like YOU, and I cannot do this without your help. **I am asking my top supporters to please do the following:**
1. **Donate **[online](https://gmail.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=60170c3a179cc01468053f87a&id=1bccc153bb&e=c1dbff800f) – any amount helps!
2. **Like** our [Facebook](https://gmail.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=60170c3a179cc01468053f87a&id=7257988413&e=c1dbff800f) page, and follow me on [Twitter](https://gmail.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=60170c3a179cc01468053f87a&id=6f3c717e12&e=c1dbff800f) and [Instagram](https://gmail.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=60170c3a179cc01468053f87a&id=8c5dfea2e1&e=c1dbff800f).
3. **Share** campaign social media posts online with your friends and family.
4. [**Visit**](https://gmail.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=60170c3a179cc01468053f87a&id=55275f25b9&e=c1dbff800f) my website and **[volunteer](https://gmail.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=60170c3a179cc01468053f87a&id=15d67810bc&e=c1dbff800f)** to make phone calls, canvass your neighborhood, host a meet & greet, or join me for an upcoming event!

---
| Thank you so much for your support in this journey.

Until next week!

-Renee
---

name: =?utf-8?Q?Marc=20Flores?=
subject: Reminder: We're Canvassing Tomorrow!
body:
Good afternoon Peter,
We are going to be out knocking on doors this weekend, and we need you to be there with us.

Tomorrow at 9:00 AM, we'll be meeting at Goodman Elementary School to meet more voters, and tell them why they should vote for Marc. Sign up to canvass with us here (https://www.mobilize.us/marcfloresforcongress/event/152435/?utm_source=Marc+Flores+for+Congress&utm_campaign=84f6ab0290-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2019_11_15_07_03&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_b08c1b6182-84f6ab0290-32267927) !
Click here to canvass this weekend! (https://www.mobilize.us/marcfloresforcongress/event/149564/?utm_source=Marc+Flores+for+Congress&utm_campaign=84f6ab0290-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2019_11_15_07_03&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_b08c1b6182-84f6ab0290-32267927)
We would also like to thank Mary Schultz for graciously hosting a meet and greet last Sunday. Marc had a great discussion with a few of her interested neighbors who are ready for a change!
If you would like to host a meet and greet, email us at volunteer@marcfloresforcongress.com (mailto:volunteer@marcfloresforcongress.com?subject=Re%3A%20Host%20a%20Meet%20and%20Greet!) !

Thank you for your support! We can't do this without you.

Marc

name: Booker HQ
subject: Team, Cory has not yet qualified for the December debate.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Cory 2020
body:
| | |
---
| Today's the deadline to hit our $550,000 goal, friend -- and as you can see, we've still got a ways to go. **[Can you make a donation right now to help us hit our target by tonight? Anything you can give puts us one step closer.](https://act.corybooker.%3D/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cory2020-em-decdebate?refcode=em_fr_20191115_BHQ_20191115-fr-BHQ-progress-actives_actives_l1_v1&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Cresco&state=PA&zip=18326&phone=&occupation=&employer=")** We're less than three months away from Iowa caucus-goers making their voices heard in this primary, and right now Cory has not yet qualified for the December debate. We've got to hit every goal we set from here on out, but this one is about making sure we execute a plan to meet the DNC debate stage thresholds. For an underdog candidate like Cory up against well-funded frontrunners and self-funding billionaires with "unlimited" budgets, that won't be as easy as it sounds. The Boss made it very clear from the jump: We're not accepting money from corporate PACs, federal lobbyists, or big oil and pharma executives. That's why we send you emails like this one, because we can't do this without you. Cory is relying on you to help build this campaign and make sure as many people as possible hear our message. **[So what do you say: Can we count on you to chip in for the first time to meet our Ground Game Fund goal tonight?](https://act.corybooker.%3D/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cory2020-em-decdebate?refcode=em_fr_20191115_BHQ_20191115-fr-BHQ-progress-actives_actives_l2_v1&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Cresco&state=PA&zip=18326&phone=&occupation=&employer=")** Thanks,
Booker HQ [](https://act.corybooker.%3D/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cory2020-em-decdebate?refcode=em_fr_20191115_BHQ_20191115-fr-BHQ-progress-actives_actives_contribbutton_v1&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Cresco&state=PA&zip=18326&phone=&occupation=&employer=")
---
| | Paid for by Cory 2020
---

P.O. Box 32009 Newark, NJ 07102 | All content (C) 2019 Cory 2020, All Rights Reserved.
Contributions or gifts to Cory 2020 are not tax deductible.

This campaign is moving quickly. If you want the most up-to-date information, follow Cory on [Instagram](https://act.corybooker.com/page/m/4fdc0d6f/5fca0d19/79c0e484/291c73d5/3992930016/VEsD/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://www.instagram.com/corybooker/"), [Twitter](https://act.corybooker.com/page/m/4fdc0d6f/5fca0d19/79c0e484/291c73d4/3992930016/VEsA/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://twitter.com/corybooker"), and [Facebook](https://act.corybooker.com/page/m/4fdc0d6f/5fca0d19/79c0e484/291c73d3/3992930016/VEsB/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://www.facebook.com/corybooker").
It's time for leadership that can reignite our spirit of common purpose. That takes all of us. We believe these emails are an important way to stay in touch, but if at any point you'd like to stop getting these updates, you can unsubscribe [here](https://act.corybooker.com/page/m/4fdc0d6f/5fca0d19/79c0e484/291c73d2/3992930016/VEsO/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://act.corybooker.com/unsubscribe").

name: Warren 2020
subject: This morning
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Warren for President
body:
This morning, Elizabeth released her plan on how we transition to Medicare for All in her first term as president... | | |
---
Today was a big day for our campaign.

This morning, Elizabeth released her plan on how we transition to Medicare for All in her first term as president.

Her plan wastes no time: In her first 100 days, Elizabeth will fight to pass fast-track budget reconciliation legislation to create a true Medicare for All option. And by her third year in office, she will fight to pass legislation and complete the transition to Medicare for All by the end of her first term.

**All without raising taxes on the middle class by one penny.

We can do this. Together, we can end the era of families going broke over medical bills and GoFundMe campaigns for health care. But Elizabeth needs your help to keep fighting so we can win in 2020 and make big, structural change in 2021.**

[**Will you make your first contribution of $3 today to help us stay on track of our November goal and show the world that there a grassroots movement ready for big, structural change?**](https://my.elizabethwarren.com/page/m/285289fe/45c30650/10500490a/66f42f3a/1702016047/VEsH/p/eyJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsImUzc2dkWEpzSUgxOSI6ImV3LW5vdjE5ZnIiLCJlM3NnY21WbVkyOWtaU0I5ZlE9PSI6IkVNTDc1Rl9STFRfS0lDX1dfMjAxOTExMTVfVjFTMl9QX1QxIn0%3D/?g=4qwscq_HJ6FcsC0VbCsFfMA "https://secure.elizabethwarren.com/donate/ew-nov19fr?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&refcode=EML75F_RLT_KIC_W_20191115_V1S2_P_T1")

\---------- Forwarded message ----------
From: **Elizabeth Warren** <info@elizabethwarren.com>
Date: Fri, Nov 15, 2019
Subject: Add your name: Our plan to transition to Medicare for All
To: dpwillis67@gmail.com
---
I've already laid out how we can pay for Medicare for All without raising any middle-class taxes -- and while putting $11 trillion in the pockets of American families.

But every serious proposal for Medicare for All contemplates a significant transition period. And that's why, today, I'm announcing my plan to expand public health care coverage, reduce costs, and improve the quality of care for every family in America.

My plan will be completed in my first term. It includes dramatic actions to lower drug prices, a Medicare for All option available to everyone that is more generous than any plan proposed by any other presidential candidate, critical health system reforms to save money and save lives, and a full transition to Medicare for All.

We know every step in the coming fight to improve American health care -- like every other fight to improve American health care -- will be opposed by those powerful industries who profit from our broken system.

But I'll fight my heart out at each step of this process, for one simple reason: **I spent a lifetime learning about families going broke, including from the high cost of health care. When I'm president of the United States, I'm going to do everything in my power to make sure that never happens to another person again.**

[**I'm not afraid to fight, and I know how to win. It starts with our grassroots movement. Add your name if you support our plan to get to Medicare for All. I'll always be deeply grateful to fight by your side.**](https://my.elizabethwarren.com/page/m/285289fe/45c30650/10500490a/66f42f29/1702016047/VEsEAQ/p/eyJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVm1hWEp6ZEc1aGJXVWxKUT09IjoiIiwiSlNWc1lYTjBibUZ0WlNVbCI6IiIsIkpTVjZhWEFsSlE9PSI6IjE4MzI2IiwiZTNzZ2NtVm1ZMjlrWlNCOWZRPT0iOiJFTUw3NUZfUkxUX0tJQ19XXzIwMTkxMTE1X1YxUzJfUF9UMSJ9/?g=4qwscq_HJ6FcsC0VbCsFfMA "https://my.elizabethwarren.com/page/s/ew-m4a?source=EML75F_RLT_KIC_W_20191115_V1S2_P_T1&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&zip=18326")

**In my first 100 days, I'll...**

-> **Pursue comprehensive anti-corruption reforms to rein in health insurers and drug companies:** If the next president has any intention of winning any health care fight, they must start by reforming Washington. By closing the revolving door, taxing excessive lobbying, ending lobbyist bribery, and more, we will keep powerful special interests from blocking Medicare for All.

-> **Use the tools of the presidency to immediately start improving health coverage and lowering costs:** I'll reverse Donald Trump's sabotage of the Affordable Care Act, protect people with pre-existing conditions, take on the big pharmaceutical companies to lower costs of key drugs for millions of Americans, and improve the Affordable Care Act, Medicare, and Medicaid.

-> **Fight for a true Medicare for All option that's immediately free for tens of millions:** I'll use the same process Mitch McConnell used to try to kill the Affordable Care Act and bypass the filibuster. We will give every American over the age of 50 the choice to enter an improved Medicare program. And we will give every person in America the choice to get coverage through a true Medicare for All option. Coverage under the new Medicare for All option will be immediately free for children under the age of 18 and for families making at or below 200% of the federal poverty level (about $51,000 for a family of four).

Look: There are many proposals out there that claim to be a "public option" -- but most of them create the illusion of choice, when in reality they offer tens of millions of Americans the decision between unaffordable private insurance and unaffordable public insurance. A choice between two bad options isn't a choice at all.

My approach is different. I have identified trillions in revenue to finance a fully functioning Medicare for All system -- without raising taxes on the middle class by one penny -- I can also fund a true Medicare for All option.

By the end of my first 100 days, we will have opened the door for tens of millions of Americans to get high-quality Medicare for All coverage at little or no cost. But I won't stop there. Throughout my first term, I'll also fight for additional health system reforms to save money and save lives -- including a boost of $100 billion in guaranteed, mandatory spending for new NIH research.

**Then, by my third year in office, I'll fight to pass legislation that would complete the transition to full Medicare for All by the end of my first term.** By then, the American people will know what it's like to have the full benefits of a true Medicare for All option, and they'll know how it stacks up against high-priced care that requires them to fight tooth and nail against their insurance company. By integrating every American into the new program, the American people would save trillions of dollars on health costs. The choice will be clear.

**And at each step of my plan, millions more Americans will pay lower costs for care. Millions more Americans will see the quality of their current health coverage improve. And millions more Americans will have the choice to ditch their private insurance and enter a high-quality public plan.**

**But we won't get it done unless we fight side by side.** Health insurance and drug companies are profiting off of people's pain right now, and they don't want big, structural change -- but the American people need it.

[**Add your name to demand Medicare for All, and be in this fight all the way.**](https://my.elizabethwarren.com/page/m/285289fe/45c30650/10500490a/66f42f29/1702016047/VEsEAA/p/eyJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVm1hWEp6ZEc1aGJXVWxKUT09IjoiIiwiSlNWc1lYTjBibUZ0WlNVbCI6IiIsIkpTVjZhWEFsSlE9PSI6IjE4MzI2IiwiZTNzZ2NtVm1ZMjlrWlNCOWZRPT0iOiJFTUw3NUZfUkxUX0tJQ19XXzIwMTkxMTE1X1YxUzJfUF9UMSJ9/?g=4qwscq_HJ6FcsC0VbCsFfMA "https://my.elizabethwarren.com/page/s/ew-m4a?source=EML75F_RLT_KIC_W_20191115_V1S2_P_T1&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&zip=18326")

Thanks for being a part of this,

Elizabeth

[ **ADD YOUR NAME**](https://my.elizabethwarren.com/page/m/285289fe/45c30650/10500490a/66f42f29/1702016047/VEsEAw/p/eyJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVm1hWEp6ZEc1aGJXVWxKUT09IjoiIiwiSlNWc1lYTjBibUZ0WlNVbCI6IiIsIkpTVjZhWEFsSlE9PSI6IjE4MzI2IiwiZTNzZ2NtVm1ZMjlrWlNCOWZRPT0iOiJFTUw3NUZfUkxUX0tJQ19XXzIwMTkxMTE1X1YxUzJfUF9UMSJ9/?g=4qwscq_HJ6FcsC0VbCsFfMA "https://my.elizabethwarren.com/page/s/ew-m4a?source=EML75F_RLT_KIC_W_20191115_V1S2_P_T1&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&zip=18326")

name: Tina Smith
subject: Can I count on you before midnight?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Tina Smith for Minnesota
body:
Republicans and special interests are taking Minnesota seriously because they believe our state is vulnerable. That's why your donation matters.

| [](https://action.tinaforminnesota.%3D%3D/?g=YCjTcDpTVzRarKyUt8_RZpA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tsm-em191115-truth?refcode=em191115-truth&recurring=yes&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=PA&phone=&employer=&occupation=&amount=10") Here's the truth, folks:

**Minnesota is a top target for Trump and the GOP.** Republicans and right-wing super PACs spent millions of dollars against me last year, and Trump has publicly stated he's going to win our state in 2020 -- after losing Minnesota by just 1.5 points in 2016.

The only way we can counter whatever happens in the coming weeks is with donations from grassroots supporters like you. So, I'm asking:

**Can I count on you to pitch in $10 or whatever you can afford to support our campaign before the mid-quarter deadline at midnight? With your help, we can overcome the large sums of dark money Republicans will pour in to defeat me.** _If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | [$10 »](https://action.tinaforminnesota.%3D%3D/?g=YCjTcDpTVzRarKyUt8_RZpA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tsm-em191115-truth?refcode=em191115-truth&recurring=yes&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=PA&phone=&employer=&occupation=&express_lane=true&amount=10")

name: =?utf-8?Q?The=20White=20House?=
subject: Five stories President Trump doesn’t want you to miss
body:
"Ukrainian Foreign Minister Vadym Prystaiko said on Thursday that the United States Ambassador Gordon Sondland did not link..." | | | | [ ](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=81e0f0c494&e=3ee4985eea)
---
| **_FIVE STORIES PRESIDENT TRUMP DOESN'T WANT YOU TO MISS_**
---
| | | [**New Remarks From Top Ukrainian Official Damages Democrats’ Impeachment Narrative**](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=8ba8357858&e=3ee4985eea)
-_The Daily Wire_
“Ukrainian Foreign Minister Vadym Prystaiko said on Thursday that the United States Ambassador Gordon Sondland did not link financial military assistance to a request for Ukraine to open up an investigation into former vice president and current Democratic presidential candidate Joe Biden and his son, Hunter Biden,” Ryan Saavedra reports.
---
|
---
| [**Even Impeachment ‘Rehearsal’ Hearings Won’t Help Dems**](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=171eb6181c&e=3ee4985eea)
-_New York Post_
“Clever: By having witnesses go through closed-door hearings first, Dems can get a sense of what witnesses have to say privately and then tailor their questions for maximum impact during the public spectacle,” the _New York Post_ editorial board writes. “Trouble is, even rehearsals don’t seem to help . . . No matter how many auditions they hold, it’s no substitute for hard evidence.”

**_The Daily Signal:_** [Meet the impeachment witnesses’ anti-Trump lawyers](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=3aec78032e&e=3ee4985eea)
---
|
---
| [**The President, Not Diplomats, Sets 'Official Foreign Policy'**](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=c6f5b142cd&e=3ee4985eea)
-_The Hill_
“There must be some confusion. Under the U.S. Constitution, it is the president of the United States who determines foreign policy. How can President Trump be ‘at odds with foreign policy’ when he’s the one who determines it?” Sharyl Attkisson writes. “Trump’s enemies may cheer on the idea of diplomats and other officials choosing to oppose or undermine his wishes. But based on our Constitution, the dissenting diplomats are the ones who are at odds with “official foreign policy”— not the other way around.”

**🎬****Must-see:** [Ukraine got their lethal aid from President Trump, not Obama](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=eb6011570a&e=3ee4985eea)
---
|
---
| [**Trickster Adam Schiff Conjuring ‘Guilt’ Out of Thin Air**](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=02b68a63a0&e=3ee4985eea)
-_New York Post_
“For those who find the hearings far from riveting but watch out of obligation or amusement, here’s a modest suggestion to pass the hours productively: Count the important things your representatives could and should be doing otherwise,” Michael Goodwin writes. Fix immigration, pass USMCA, rebuild infrastructure—take your pick.
---
|
---
| [**Trump Delivers a Salute to Veterans at Historic NYC Parade**](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=b006ccfefa&e=3ee4985eea)
-Military.com
“President Donald Trump paid tribute Monday to all Americans who have worn a military uniform, from the Revolution through present-day conflicts. He spoke at the start of the annual New York City Veterans Day parade,” Richard Sisk reports. President Trump became the first sitting U.S. President to attend the parade. “Our veterans risked everything for us. Now, it is our duty to serve and protect them,” he said.

**🎬****Watch:** [The President and First Lady attend the NYC Veterans Day Parade](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=9f1ac12314&e=3ee4985eea)
---
|

[Privacy Policy](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=e0924c82a3&e=3ee4985eea) | [Contact the White House](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=c0350a4e69&e=3ee4985eea) | [Unsubscribe](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/unsubscribe?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=8cafb01033&e=3ee4985eea&c=09d452db8b)
---
| | | The White House * 1600 Pennsylvania Ave NW * Washington, DC 20500 * USA · 202-456-1111
---

Bloomberg's potential run comes on the heels of many Democratic insiders voicing concern over the progressive and left-leaning shift of the party and two of its leading candidates, senators Bernie Sanders and Elizabeth Warren.
