name: Andrew Yang
subject: Your data is worth more than you know
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Andrew Yang
body:
You deserve to be informed and in charge.

| [](http://act.yang2020.com/go/68?t=1&akid=3154%2E377263%2EE3CVfb) **I’m asking you to show your support for my new policy providing 21st century solutions for 21st century technology.

Can you sign on today? ** | [Add Your Name](https://act.yang2020.com/signup/email-20191115PM-techpolicy?source=email-20191115PM-all&t=6&akid=3154%2E377263%2EE3CVfb)
---
Yang Gang --

Did you know that your personal data is worth more than oil? With the rapid growth of technology and media, personal data is now America’s fastest growing industry. And we don’t have nearly enough protections in place.

That’s why I just released a new policy detailing how I will bring laws and regulations up to 21st century standards. Technology has boomed at such a fast rate that it has greatly outpaced our government’s understanding of it.

Now, we must take the time to catch up and make sure we comprehend the risks as well as the benefits.

[ Are you with me? Show your support for updated tech regulations and advisories here. ](https://act.yang2020.com/signup/email-20191115PM-techpolicy?source=email-20191115PM-all&t=9&akid=3154%2E377263%2EE3CVfb)
[Add Your Name](https://act.yang2020.com/signup/email-20191115PM-techpolicy?source=email-20191115PM-all&t=8&akid=3154%2E377263%2EE3CVfb)
---
My policy establishes your data as a property right, understands and minimizes health risks of technology, stops the spread of misinformation, and updates the government’s understanding of technology.

Technology affects us all. Whether you’re a single parent at home with your child, the CEO of a major corporation, or a lawmaker in Washington, technology is ingrained in who you are and how you lead your life.

You deserve to be informed and in charge. My policy makes sure you stay in the driver’s seat.

[ Show your support today by signing my petition. ](https://act.yang2020.com/signup/email-20191115PM-techpolicy?source=email-20191115PM-all&t=7&akid=3154%2E377263%2EE3CVfb)
[Add Your Name](https://act.yang2020.com/signup/email-20191115PM-techpolicy?source=email-20191115PM-all&t=10&akid=3154%2E377263%2EE3CVfb)
---
Thank you,

-Andrew
**We don't have corporate PACs or big donors who can close the fundraising gap we face, just grassroots donors like you powering this campaign. Please give now.** | [Contribute](https://act.yang2020.com/go/16875?t=2&akid=3154%2E377263%2EE3CVfb)
---

name: John Delaney
subject: my opponents aren't telling the truth, folks
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of John Delaney
body:
| [ ](https://go.johndelaney.com/page/m/29b90197/30fd46cd/32dc46dc/2354ff9b/4241618280/VEsH/?g=O8raRzpTVzRcsC_9bxO1vUA "https://www.johndelaney.com/?utm_medium=email&utm_source=johndelaney&utm_content=1+-+++&utm_campaign=em_fr_2019.11.13_e1_jkd_mid-month_all&source=em_fr_2019.11.13_e1_jkd_mid-month_all") Friends, I wanted to give you a quick update about where we are in this campaign:

First, I'll be frank -- I'm worried about the state of our party.

**Our Democratic nominee has to be consistently telling the truth -- telling a better -- and _realistic_ \-- story about the future we can share together.**

But there are too many important issues facing the American people today that my fellow candidates are choosing to ignore.

We need universal health care, but why would we force people off plans that they like? And why would we risk hospitals closing when Medicare for All lowers their reimbursement rates? And why would we ignore rural America when Trump's trade policies have given us the opportunity to show that we can offer them a better economic future? When will we stop villainizing businesses and entrepreneurs and instead start focusing on helping workers AND businesses succeed in our economy? And why are Democrats risking four more years of Trump by putting forth half-baked plans that voters will see right through?

_These truths are integral to winning back the White House next November._ [**I 'm committed to continuing to stand by our platform -- but I need to know you stand with me. clean_body: | "" Friends, I wanted to give you a quick update about where we are in this campaign: First, I'll be frank -- I'm worried about the state of our party. Our Democratic nominee has to be consistently telling the truth -- telling a better -- and realistic \-- story about the future we can share together. But there are too many important issues facing the American people today that my fellow candidates are choosing to ignore. We need universal health care, but why would we force people off plans that they like? And why would we risk hospitals closing when Medicare for All lowers their reimbursement rates? And why would we ignore rural America when Trump's trade policies have given us the opportunity to show that we can offer them a better economic future? When will we stop villainizing businesses and entrepreneurs and instead start focusing on helping workers AND businesses succeed in our economy? And why are Democrats risking four more years of Trump by putting forth half-baked plans that voters will see right through? These truths are integral to winning back the White House next November. subject: Impeachment Begins, President Trump Needs Our Help
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY ROB ORTT FOR CONGRESS
body:
| |
---
| | |
---
|
Dear Friend,

The impeachment process has begun. President Trump - and our country - are in a fight for survival.

**[Our president needs our help.](https://gmail.us4.list-manage.com/track/click?u=8c02d052541198272b8fde278&id=ec680a5262&e=9f843ba602)**

The regressive left is following through on the singular mission they concocted on election night in 2016 - that they would undermine and de-legitimatize our president at every opportunity.

They're trying to circumvent the will of the American people. **[We can't let that happen!](https://gmail.us4.list-manage.com/track/click?u=8c02d052541198272b8fde278&id=14d5c02064&e=9f843ba602)**

The witch hunt and spectacle of impeachment also serves as a distraction for Democrats in Washington. They have no plans to create jobs, address illegal immigration, cut taxes and spending, or rein in health care costs. What they DO have, though, is a well-financed and well-executed plan of attack and they have a partisan news media willing to carry their water. This is the same mainstream news media that is responsible for covering up the highest-profile pedophilia operation our nation has ever seen in exchange for access to political officials and popular figures. Talk about quid pro quo...

Now is not the time for national Republicans to sit back or quiet down. The stakes are too high.
